able.example_en: Will she be able to cope with the work?

about.example_en: He's always going on about what a great job he's got.
about.example_zh: 他總是喋喋不休地炫耀他的工作有多麼好。

above.definition: 在（或向）…上面；在（或向）…較高處
above.example_en: There's a mirror above the sink.

abroad.example_en: We always go abroad in the summer.
abroad.example_zh: 我們夏天總是到國外去。

absent.definition: （尤指上課或工作）缺勤的；缺席的；不在場的
absent.example_en: John has been absent from school/work for three days now.
absent.example_zh: 約翰到現在已經曠課／曠工三天了。

accept.example_zh: 你們接受信用卡付帳嗎？

accident.example_en: Josh had an accident and spilled water all over his work.
accident.example_zh: 喬希不小心把作業上灑得都是水。

across.definition: 從一邊到另一邊;穿過;橫過

act.example_en: Don't be so silly - you're acting like a child!
act.example_zh: 別傻了——你的行為簡直就像個孩子！

action.definition: （尤指應對問題或困難的）行動；行動過程；行為
action.example_en: This problem calls for swift/prompt action from the government.
action.example_zh: 這個問題需要政府馬上採取行動。

active.example_en: He is 90 years old, but remains active in the local community.

activity.example_en: Economists are concerned by the low level of economic activity.
activity.example_zh: 經濟學家們都為經濟不景氣而擔憂。

actor.example_zh: 「你最喜歡的演員是誰？」「勞勃‧狄尼洛。」

actress.example_en: She's the highest-paid actress in Hollywood.
actress.example_zh: 她是好萊塢片酬最高的女演員。

actually.example_en: I didn't actually see her - I just heard her voice.
actually.example_zh: 實際上我並沒有看見她，只是聽到了她的聲音。

add.example_en: It's $45 - $50 if you add in the cost of postage.

address.example_zh: 她的公司地址／家庭住址

admire.example_en: We stood for a few moments, admiring the view.
admire.example_zh: 我們駐足了一會兒，欣賞美麗的景色。

adult.example_en: An adult under English law is someone over 18 years old.
adult.example_zh: 根據英國法律規定，成年人是指18歲以上人士。

advertisement.example_en: I saw an advertisement for the new restaurant that opened in town.

advice.example_en: I need some advice on which computer to buy.
advice.example_zh: 我需要聽聽別人的意見來決定買哪種電腦。

advise.definition: 勸告;忠告;向…提供意見，給…出主意
advise.example_en: I think I'd advise him to leave the company.
advise.example_zh: 我想，我會建議他離開這家公司。

affect.example_en: Both buildings were badly affected by the fire.
affect.example_zh: 兩座樓都在大火中嚴重受損。

afraid.definition: 畏懼的，害怕的;擔憂的，發愁的
afraid.example_en: She was afraid for her children (= feared that they might be hurt).

after.definition: （時間、地點或順序）在…之後;（一個）接著（一個）
after.example_en: Let's go for a walk after breakfast.
after.example_zh: 我們吃過早餐去散步吧。

afternoon.example_zh: 那是一個陽光明媚的下午。

again.example_en: Could you spell your name again, please?
again.example_zh: 請您再拼一次您的名字好嗎？

against.example_en: She spoke against the decision to close the college.
against.example_zh: 她聲言反對關閉學院的決定。

age.example_en: Do you know the age of that building?
age.example_zh: 你知道那座樓的歷史有多久嗎？

ago.example_en: He left the house over an hour ago.
ago.example_zh: 他一個多小時前離開了這所房子。

agree.example_en: Ann and I never seem to agree.
agree.example_zh: 安和我好像從來都沒有意見一致過。

ahead.example_en: The road ahead is very busy.

aim.example_en: My main aim in life is to be a good husband and father.
aim.example_zh: 我人生的主要目標是做一個好丈夫和好爸爸。

air.example_en: I went outside to get some fresh air.
air.example_zh: 我到室外呼吸一下新鮮空氣。

airplane.example_en: She has her own private airplane.

alarm.example_en: If there's any trouble, raise/sound the alarm by pulling the emergency cord.
alarm.example_zh: 如果出現任何問題，拉緊急警報索報警。

album.example_en: Have you heard their new album?
album.example_zh: 你聽過他們的新專輯嗎？

alike.example_en: The children all look very alike.

alive.example_en: She's alive and well and living in New Zealand.
alive.example_zh: 她生活得很好，目前住在紐西蘭。

all.example_en: The judge cleared the court of all but (= everyone except) herself and the witness.
all.example_zh: 法官命令所有人離開法庭，只留下她自己和證人。

allow.definition: 使有可能;允許，准許;容許
allow.example_en: Do you think Dad will allow you to go to Jamie's party?
allow.example_zh: 你認為爸爸會允許你去參加傑米的聚會嗎？

almost.definition: 幾乎，差不多，差一點，將近

alone.definition: 單獨（的），獨自（的）;孤獨的（地），無伴的（地）
alone.example_en: He likes being alone in the house.
alone.example_zh: 他喜歡自己一個人呆在家裡。

along.example_en: a romantic walk along the beach/river
along.example_zh: 沿著海灘／河邊的浪漫散步

aloud.example_en: He read her letter aloud to the rest of the family.
aloud.example_zh: 他把她的信大聲讀給家人聽。

already.example_en: I asked him to come to the exhibition but he'd already seen it.
already.example_zh: 我請他去看展覽，可他早就看過了。

also.example_en: She's a photographer and also writes books.
also.example_zh: 她是個攝影師，還是個作家。

always.example_en: It's always cold in this room.

among.example_en: I saw a few familiar faces among the crowd.
among.example_zh: 我在人群中看見了幾張熟悉的面孔。

ancient.definition: 古代的；古老的；年代久遠的
ancient.example_zh: 古代文明／自古有之的權利／古代法律

angel.example_en: According to the Bible, an angel told Mary that she would have God's son, Jesus.
angel.example_zh: 據《聖經》所述，一位天使告知瑪利亞她將生下上帝之子耶穌。

anger.example_en: I think he feels a lot of anger towards his father, who treated him very badly as a child.
anger.example_zh: 我想，他對父親耿耿於懷，是因為小時候受到了他的虐待。

angry.example_en: He's really angry at/with me for upsetting Sophie.
angry.example_zh: 因為我惹了索菲，他很生我的氣。

animal.definition: （除人、鳥、魚和昆蟲之外的）動物；獸；牲畜

ankle.example_en: I fell over and twisted my ankle.

another.example_en: I'm going to have another piece of cake.

answer.definition: 回答;作答;答應;答覆;答案
answer.example_en: In answer to your letter of 30 May, I am writing to accept your offer of £3,575 in compensation.
answer.example_zh: 茲覆貴方5月30日來函，今特告我方接受貴方3575英鎊賠償金的提議。

any.example_en: Is there any of that lemon cake left?
any.example_zh: 檸檬蛋糕有沒有剩下一點啊？

anyone.definition: （用於疑問句和否定句中）有人，任何人
anyone.example_en: I haven't spoken to anyone all day.
anyone.example_zh: 我一整天都沒跟任何人說過話。

anything.definition: （用於疑問句或否定句中）任何事物，任何東西
anything.example_en: Is there anything I can do to help?
anything.example_zh: 有甚麼地方我可以幫忙的嗎？

anywhere.definition: 在（或去）任何地方;隨便哪個地方
anywhere.example_en: You won't find a better plumber anywhere in England.
anywhere.example_zh: 在英格蘭任何地方你都找不到比他更好的水管工了。

apartment.example_en: I'll give you the keys to my apartment.
apartment.example_zh: 我會把我公寓的鎖匙給你。

apologize.example_en: I must apologize to Isobel for my lateness.
apologize.example_zh: 我遲到了，必須向伊莎貝爾道個歉。

appear.example_en: He suddenly appeared in the doorway.

appreciate.example_en: There's no point buying him expensive wines - he doesn't appreciate them.
appreciate.example_zh: 給他買名貴的酒沒有用——他不懂品酒。

area.example_en: All areas of the country will have some rain tonight.
area.example_zh: 今晚全國所有地區都將有降雨。

argue.example_en: They were arguing over which film to go and see.
argue.example_zh: 他們正在爭論去看哪部電影。

arm.example_en: He held her in his arms (= held her closely).

armchair.example_en: She sat in an armchair by the fire, reading a newspaper.
armchair.example_zh: 她坐在火爐旁的扶手椅上看報紙。

army.example_en: When did you join the army?

around.definition: 四處，周圍；圍繞，（環）繞；掉轉

arrange.example_en: I'm trying to arrange my work so that I can have a couple of days off next week.
arrange.example_zh: 我正設法把工作安排好，以便下週能夠休息兩天。

arrive.definition: 到達，抵達（尤指到達旅途的終點）;到來;來臨
arrive.example_en: What time will your train arrive?
arrive.example_zh: 你坐的火車甚麼時候到？

art.definition: （包括雕塑、繪畫、音樂等的） 藝術
art.example_en: Can television and pop music really be considered art?
art.example_zh: 電視和流行音樂真的能被當作藝術嗎？

artist.definition: 藝術家;美術家;畫家;雕塑家
artist.example_en: Monet is one of my favourite artists.
artist.example_zh: 莫內是我最喜歡的畫家之一。

as.example_en: She'll soon be as tall as her mother.
as.example_zh: 她很快就會和她母親一樣高了。

asleep.example_en: I'm surprised to see you awake - ten minutes ago you were fast/sound (= completely) asleep.
asleep.example_zh: 真奇怪，你怎麼醒了——十分鐘前你還睡得很甜呢。

assume.definition: 假定，假設;臆斷，想當然地認為
assume.example_en: We mustn't assume the suspects' guilt.
assume.example_zh: 我們千萬不能想當然地認為疑犯有罪。

attack.example_en: He was attacked and seriously injured by a gang of youths.
attack.example_zh: 他被一幫年輕人打成重傷。

attention.example_en: Ladies and gentlemen, could I have your attention, please?
attention.example_zh: 女士們、先生們，請大家注意一下好嗎？

august.example_en: They usually go to their holiday home in August.
august.example_zh: 他們通常八月去度假屋住。

aunt.definition: 姑母;姨母;嬸嬸;伯母;舅母
aunt.example_en: I have an aunt in Australia.
aunt.example_zh: 我有一個姑媽在澳大利亞。

autumn.example_en: We like to travel in (the) autumn when there are fewer tourists.
autumn.example_zh: 我們喜歡在秋天出遊，那時遊客較少。

available.example_en: Is this dress available in a larger size?
available.example_zh: 這件衣服有大一號的嗎？

avoid.example_en: I try to avoid supermarkets on Saturdays - they're always so busy.
avoid.example_zh: 我儘量避開週六去超級市場——那時總是人特別多。

away.definition: 去（或在）別處；向另一方向；向一邊
away.example_en: Ms Watson is away on holiday until the end of the week.
away.example_zh: 沃森女士度假去了，要到週末才能回來。

baby.definition: （尤指尚未學會走路或說話的）嬰兒，嬰孩

back.definition: 在原處；回到原處；恢復原狀；返回；回到以前
back.example_en: He looked back and saw they were following him.
back.example_zh: 他回頭看了看，發現他們正跟著他。

bad.definition: 壞的，不好的；令人不悅的
bad.example_en: Our holiday was spoiled by bad weather.
bad.example_zh: 我們的假期全被壞天氣給破壞了。

bake.example_en: I made the icing while the cake was baking.
bake.example_zh: 趁烤麵包的時候我做好了糖霜。

balcony.example_en: We had a drink on the hotel balcony.
balcony.example_zh: 我們在飯店的陽臺上喝酒。

balloon.example_en: We tied balloons and streamers to the ceiling ready for the party.
balloon.example_zh: 我們把氣球和彩帶繫在天花板上，晚會的佈置已準備妥當。

bank.example_en: The big banks have been accused of exploiting small firms.
bank.example_zh: 大型銀行被指責剝削小企業。

barbecue.example_en: Make sure you light the barbecue in plenty of time.
barbecue.example_zh: 一定要提前足夠時間點火，準備好烤肉架。

base.example_en: a crystal glass with a heavy base

baseball.example_en: Jake never played baseball like the other kids.
baseball.example_zh: 傑克不像別的孩子，他從不打棒球。

basement.example_en: Our kitchenware department is in the basement.
basement.example_zh: 我們的廚具部門設在地下室。

basic.example_en: I really need to get some basic financial advice.
basic.example_zh: 我的確需要一些有關金融的基本建議。

bat.example_zh: 棒球球棒／板球球板／跑柱式棒球球棒／乒乓球球拍

bath.example_en: Susannah has a long hot bath every evening.
bath.example_zh: 蘇珊娜每天晚上都要美美地泡個熱水澡。

bathe.example_en: Children suffering from the illness had bathed in sea water contaminated by sewage.
bathe.example_zh: 患上這個病的孩子都在遭污水污染的海水裡遊過泳。

bathroom.example_en: The house has four bedrooms and two bathrooms.
bathroom.example_zh: 這座房子有四間臥房和兩個洗澡間。

beach.example_en: We spent the day on the beach.
beach.example_zh: 我們在海灘度過了一整天。

bear.example_en: The strain must have been enormous but she bore it well.
bear.example_zh: 當時壓力一定很大，但她承受住了。

beat.example_en: Simon always beats me at tennis.
beat.example_zh: 西蒙在打網球時總是贏我。

beauty.example_en: This is an area of outstanding natural beauty.
beauty.example_zh: 這個地方自然風景極其優美。

because.example_en: "Why did you do it?" "Because Carlos told me to".
because.example_zh: 「你為甚麼做出這事？」「因為卡洛斯叫我去做的。」

become.example_en: I was becoming increasingly suspicious of his motives.
become.example_zh: 我越來越懷疑他的動機。

bed.example_en: He lived in a room with only two chairs, a bed, and a table.
bed.example_zh: 他住的房間裡，只有兩張椅子、一張床和一張桌子。

bee.example_en: A swarm of bees flew into the garden.

beef.example_en: The spaghetti sauce is made with minced (US ground) beef.
beef.example_zh: 這種意粉的調味汁是用牛肉碎做成的。

beer.example_en: He asked for a pint of beer.

before.example_en: You should always wash your hands before meals.

begin.example_en: What time does the concert begin?

beginner.example_en: This judo class is for beginners only.
beginner.example_zh: 這個柔道課程是專為初學者開設的。

beginning.example_en: Notes on how to use this dictionary can be found at the beginning of the book.
beginning.example_zh: 這本詞典的使用說明在全書的開頭處。

behave.example_en: She always behaves well/badly when her aunts come to visit.
behave.example_zh: 每當她姨媽來作客時，她總是表現很好／很差。

believe.example_en: Strangely, no one believed us when we told them we'd been visited by a creature from Mars.
believe.example_zh: 奇怪的是，當我們告訴他們曾有火星人來訪時，居然沒人相信。

bell.example_en: I stood at the front door and rang the bell several times.
bell.example_zh: 我站在前門，按了好幾次門鈴。

belong.example_en: This table belongs in the sitting room.
belong.example_zh: 這張桌子應該放在客廳裡。

below.definition: 在較低處；在某平面之下；（位置）低於
below.example_en: From the top of the skyscraper the cars below us looked like insects.
below.example_zh: 從摩天大樓頂上往下看，下面的汽車小得像昆蟲一樣。

belt.example_en: She fastened her belt tightly around her waist.

bench.example_en: a park bench (= a seat in a public garden)

besides.example_en: She won't mind if you're late - besides, it's hardly your fault.
besides.example_zh: 她不會因為你遲到而耿耿於懷——何況這並不是你的錯。

between.example_en: The town lies halfway between Rome and Florence.
between.example_zh: 這城鎮位於羅馬和佛羅倫斯的中間。

beyond.example_en: In the distance, beyond the river, was a small town.
beyond.example_zh: 在河對岸的遠處有一座小鎮。

bicycle.example_en: I go to work by bicycle.

bitter.definition: 極為不滿的；怨恨的；無法釋懷的
bitter.example_en: I feel very bitter about my childhood and all that I went through.
bitter.example_zh: 我對童年和曾經歷的一切感到怨恨。

blame.example_en: Don't blame me (= it is not my fault) if you miss the bus!
blame.example_zh: 如果你沒趕上公車可別怪我！

block.example_en: The museum is just six blocks away.
block.example_zh: 博物館離這兒只有六條街。

blood.example_en: He lost a lot of blood in the accident.

bloody.example_en: I've had a bloody awful week.
bloody.example_zh: 我這個星期該死的糟透了。

blow.example_en: The wind was blowing harder every minute.

blue.definition: 藍色的;天藍色的;青藍色的

body.example_en: A good diet and plenty of exercise will help you to keep your body healthy.
body.example_zh: 良好的飲食和充足的鍛煉將有助於保持身體健康。

boil.example_en: Liquid nitrogen boils at a very low temperature.
boil.example_zh: 液態氮在很低的溫度下就會達到沸點。

bomb.example_en: During World War II, the British dropped a huge number of bombs on Dresden.
bomb.example_zh: 二戰期間，英國在德累斯頓城投下了大量炸彈。

bone.example_en: The child was so thin that you could see her bones.
bone.example_zh: 這孩子瘦得可憐，都能看見她的骨頭。

book.example_en: Have you read any good books recently?
book.example_zh: 你最近讀到了什麼好書嗎？

bored.definition: 感到無聊的;感到厭煩的
bored.example_en: It was a cold, wet day and the children were bored.
bored.example_zh: 那是一個陰冷而潮濕的日子，孩子們都很無聊。

borrow.example_en: I had to borrow a pen from the invigilator to do the exam.
borrow.example_zh: 我不得不從監考人員那裡借了一支筆考試。

boss.example_en: She was the boss of a large international company.
boss.example_zh: 她曾是一家大型跨國公司的老闆。

bother.example_en: He hasn't even bothered to write.

bottom.example_en: He stood at the bottom of the stairs and called up to me.
bottom.example_zh: 他站在樓梯的最下面抬頭叫我。

bowl.example_zh: 湯碗／麥片碗／沙拉缽／糖缽

bowling.example_en: The England captain opened the bowling (= bowled first).
bowling.example_zh: 英格蘭隊隊長首先投球。

brain.example_en: Doctors tried desperately to reduce the swelling in her brain.
brain.example_zh: 醫生想盡一切辦法縮小她腦部的腫塊。

branch.example_en: Immunology is a branch of biological science.
branch.example_zh: 免疫學是生物科學的一個分支。

brand.example_en: This isn't my usual brand of deodorant.
brand.example_zh: 這不是我通常用的那個牌子的除臭劑。

break.definition: 破碎，破裂；打破；打斷；損壞，弄壞
break.example_en: I dropped the vase and it broke into pieces.
break.example_zh: 我把花瓶掉在地上摔碎了。

breakfast.example_en: What do you want for breakfast?

brick.definition: 磚頭（指無法使用的電子設備，如智慧型手機）
brick.example_en: The chimney was made of bricks.

brief.example_en: His acceptance speech was mercifully brief.
brief.example_zh: 幸而他的得獎感言很簡短。

bring.example_en: "Shall I bring anything to the party?" "Oh, just a bottle."
bring.example_zh: 「我要不要帶點東西參加派對?」「噢，帶瓶酒就行。 」

broad.example_en: We walked down a broad avenue lined with trees.

broadcast.definition: 廣播（電視或無線電節目）;播送
broadcast.example_en: Radio Caroline used to broadcast from a boat in the North Sea.
broadcast.example_zh: 加羅林電臺過去在北海的一艘船上廣播。

brother.example_en: Do you have any brothers and sisters?

brunch.example_en: We always have brunch together on Sunday.
brunch.example_zh: 週日我們總是在一起吃早午餐。

brush.example_en: I can't find my brush, but I still have my comb.
brush.example_zh: 我找不到髮刷，不過我還有梳子。

bucket.example_en: Armed with a bucket and a mop, I started washing the floor.
bucket.example_zh: 提著桶和拖把，我開始拖地板。

buffet.example_en: Are you having a sit-down meal or a buffet at the wedding?
buffet.example_zh: 你辦婚禮想擺桌宴還是提供自助餐？

bug.example_en: I had a tummy/stomach bug last week.
bug.example_zh: 上週我的腸胃出了點小毛病。

build.example_en: They're building new houses by the river.
build.example_zh: 他們正在河邊建新房子。

building.example_en: The once-empty site was now covered with buildings.
building.example_zh: 一度空蕩蕩的地方現在布滿了建築物。

burn.definition: （把…）燒壞;（使）燒傷;（使）燒毀;（使）曬傷;（使）燙傷
burn.example_en: He was badly burned in the blaze.

burst.example_en: I hate it when balloons burst.
burst.example_zh: 我討厭氣球突然破的時候。

bus.example_en: You should take the bus/go by bus (= travel by bus) if you want to see the sights.
bus.example_zh: 如果你想看風景，應該乘公車去。

businessman.definition: （尤指公司高層的）商界人士;實業家
businessman.example_en: He was a successful businessman before becoming a writer.
businessman.example_zh: 在成為作家之前，他是一位成功的實業家。

busy.example_en: Mum was busy in the kitchen.

but.example_en: She's very hard-working but not very imaginative.
but.example_zh: 她工作很努力，但缺乏想像力。

butter.example_en: We were served scones with butter and jam.
butter.example_zh: 我們吃的是可以塗奶油和果醬的烤餅。

button.example_en: I did up/undid (= fastened/unfastened) the buttons on my blouse.
button.example_zh: 我扣上／解開襯衫上的鈕扣。

buy.example_en: Eventually she had saved enough money to buy a small car.
buy.example_zh: 她最終存夠了買一輛小汽車的錢。

by.definition: （用於表示動作的施動者）被，由
by.example_en: The motorcycle was driven by a tiny bald man.
by.example_zh: 那輛機車由一個禿頂的小個子男人駕駛。

cafeteria.definition: （常指工廠、大學或辦公大樓內的）自助餐廳，自助食堂

cake.example_en: Would you like a piece of/a slice of/some cake?

calendar.example_en: An old calendar for 2012 was still hanging on the wall of her office.
calendar.example_zh: 她辦公室牆上依然掛著2012年的日曆。

call.example_en: They've called the twins Edward and Thomas.
call.example_zh: 他們給雙胞胎取名為愛德華和湯瑪斯。

calm.example_en: He has a very calm manner.

camera.example_en: I forgot to take my camera with me to Portugal, so I couldn't take any photos.
camera.example_zh: 我去葡萄牙時忘了帶相機，所以我一張照片都拍不到。

camp.example_en: We pitched/set up camp (= put up our tents) by the lakeside.

campus.example_en: There's accommodation for about five hundred students on campus.
campus.example_zh: 校園內可供約500名學生住宿。

cancel.example_en: They had to cancel tomorrow's game because of the bad weather.
cancel.example_zh: 因為天氣太糟，他們不得不取消了明天的比賽。

candy.definition: 糖果;巧克力;一塊糖（或巧克力）

captain.example_en: It's unusual to have a goalkeeper as (the) captain of a football team.
captain.example_zh: 讓守門員當足球隊的隊長是很少見的。

card.definition: （顯示個人資料的）卡片；銀行卡；通行證
card.example_en: I don't have any cash - can I put this on (= pay using) my (credit/charge) card?
card.example_zh: 我沒帶現金——可以用（信用／記帳）卡支付嗎？

care.example_en: The standard of care at our local hospital is excellent.
care.example_zh: 我們當地醫院的護理水準很出色。

careless.definition: 不小心的；粗心的，馬虎的
careless.example_en: My son's teacher says that his work is often rather careless.
careless.example_zh: 我兒子的老師說他做作業經常粗心大意。

carpet.example_en: We've just had a new carpet fitted/laid in our bedroom.
carpet.example_zh: 我們剛在臥室裡鋪了新地毯。

carry.example_en: Would you like me to carry your bag for you?

cartoon.definition: （尤指報刊中與政治有關的）漫畫，諷刺畫
cartoon.example_en: The TV shows kids' cartoons on Saturday mornings.
cartoon.example_zh: 電視臺在星期六早晨播放兒童動畫片。

case.example_en: She was suffering from an extreme case of sunburn.

cash.example_en: Do you have any cash on you?

cassette.definition: 盒式錄音（或錄影）帶;盒式錄音（或錄影）機

catch.example_en: He caught hold of my arm.
catch.example_zh: 他一把抓住了我的胳膊。

cause.definition: （尤指不好的事情發生的）原因，起因
cause.example_en: The police are still trying to establish the cause of the fire.
cause.example_zh: 警方仍在努力調查失火的原因。

ceiling.example_en: They have imposed/set a ceiling on pay rises.
ceiling.example_zh: 他們給工資的增加幅度訂定了上限。

celebrate.example_en: We always celebrate our wedding anniversary by going out to dinner.
celebrate.example_zh: 每年的結婚紀念日我們都出去吃飯慶祝。

cent.example_en: A call will cost you around 25 cents.
cent.example_zh: 打一個電話要花大約25美分。

central.definition: 中心的，中央的；中部的；靠近中心的；核心的

century.example_en: The city centre has scarcely changed in over a century.
century.example_zh: 一百多年來市中心幾乎沒有變化。

certain.definition: 肯定的，無疑的；有把握的；確定的
certain.example_en: Are you absolutely certain (that) you gave them the right number?
certain.example_zh: 你敢肯定你給他們的號碼沒錯嗎？

chair.example_en: Who will take the chair at the next meeting?

chalk.example_en: He picked up a piece of chalk and wrote the answer on the blackboard.
chalk.example_zh: 他拿起一支粉筆，在黑板上寫下了答案。

chance.example_en: I didn't get/have a chance to speak to her.

character.example_en: Politeness is traditionally part of the British character.
character.example_zh: 待人禮貌客氣向來是英國人性格的一部分。

charge.definition: （尤指對某一服務或活動）收費，要價，開價
charge.example_en: How much/What do you charge for a haircut and blow-dry?
charge.example_zh: 剪髮和吹風要收多少錢？

chart.example_en: There is a chart on the classroom wall showing the relative heights of all the children.
chart.example_zh: 教室牆上有一張圖表，顯示出所有孩子的相對身高。

chase.example_en: The police car was going so fast, it must have been chasing someone.
chase.example_zh: 警車開得這麼快，一定是在追捕甚麼人。

cheap.example_en: I got a cheap flight at the last minute.
cheap.example_zh: 我在最後一刻買到了一張便宜的機票。

cheat.example_en: Anyone caught cheating will be immediately disqualified from the exam.
cheat.example_zh: 任何人如被發現作弊將被立即取消考試資格。

check.example_en: You should always check your oil, water, and tyres before taking your car on a long trip.
check.example_zh: 你每次開車長途旅行前都應當檢查一下油箱、水箱和輪胎。

cheer.example_en: Everyone cheered as the winners received their medals.
cheer.example_zh: 當優勝者接受獎牌時，大家都歡呼起來。

cheese.example_en: Would you like a slice/piece of cheese with your bread?
cheese.example_zh: 你想要塊起司配麵包吃嗎？

chemical.example_en: The government has pledged to reduce the amount of chemicals used in food production.
chemical.example_zh: 政府承諾減少食品生產中化學製品的用量。

chicken.example_en: A male chicken is called a cock and a female chicken is called a hen.
chicken.example_zh: 公雞叫 cock，母雞稱作 hen。

chief.definition: 首要的；最重要的；最主要的
chief.example_en: The chief problem we have in the area now is the spread of disease.
chief.example_zh: 目前我們在這個地區面臨的首要問題是疾病的蔓延。

childlike.definition: （成人）孩子般的，單純的，純真無邪的
childlike.example_zh: 孩子般的天真無邪／氣質

chin.example_en: To keep the helmet in position, fasten the strap beneath the chin.
chin.example_zh: 將帶子在下巴下繫緊以固定好頭盔。

choice.example_en: If the product doesn't work, you are given the choice of a refund or a replacement.
choice.example_zh: 如果產品不能使用，可選擇退款或換貨。

choose.example_en: She had to choose between the two men in her life.
choose.example_zh: 面對生命中的兩個男人，她不得不從中作出選擇。

christmas.example_en: We're going to my mother's for Christmas.
christmas.example_zh: 我們要去我母親家過聖誕節。

chubby.definition: （尤指兒童）圓圓胖胖的，胖乎乎的，豐滿的

circle.example_en: Coloured paper was cut into circles.
circle.example_zh: 彩紙被剪成了圓形、正方形和三角形。

city.example_en: Many of the world's cities have populations of more than five million.
city.example_zh: 世界上許多城市的人口超過500萬。

claim.example_en: The company claims (that) it is not responsible for the pollution in the river.
claim.example_zh: 公司聲稱對該河流污染沒有責任。

clap.example_en: "When I clap my hands, you stand still," said the teacher.
clap.example_zh: 老師說：「我拍手時，你們必須站立不動。」

class.example_en: Which class are you in this year?

classic.example_zh: 菲爾丁的經典小說《湯姆‧瓊斯》

classroom.example_en: Students learning computer studies spend two days each week in a computer lab and four days in the classroom.
classroom.example_zh: 學習電腦的學生每週有兩天在電腦室上課，四天在教室上課。

clear.definition: 明白的;清楚的;易懂的;清晰的

clever.example_en: Judy has never been very clever, but she tries hard.
clever.example_zh: 裘蒂向來不是很聰明，可是她很用功。

climb.example_en: The plane climbed quickly to a height of 30,000 feet.
climb.example_zh: 飛機迅速爬升到三萬英尺的高度。

clock.example_en: We have an antique clock on our mantelpiece.
clock.example_zh: 我們家的壁爐架上有一個古老的鐘。

close.example_en: Could you close the door please?

closet.definition: （尤指放衣服的）壁櫥，壁櫃，儲藏室
closet.example_zh: 臥室壁櫥／家庭日用織品櫃櫥／儲藏室

clothes.example_zh: 她通常穿著很入時／隨意。

cloud.definition: 一團（塵土、煙霧等）;雲狀物
cloud.example_en: Do you think those are rain clouds on the horizon?
cloud.example_zh: 你看天邊那些雲是雨雲嗎？

club.example_en: I've just joined the local golf/squash/tennis club.
club.example_zh: 我剛參加了當地的高爾夫球／壁球／網球俱樂部。

coach.definition: 教練;輔導老師;私人教師;家庭教師
coach.example_zh: 網球教練／數學輔導老師

coast.example_en: Rimini is a thriving resort on the east coast of Italy.
coast.example_zh: 裡米尼是義大利東岸一個繁華的度假勝地。

coat.definition: （通常指保暖的）外套，外衣，大衣
coat.example_en: Do your coat up, Joe, or you'll freeze.
coat.example_zh: 扣好外套，喬，不然你會凍壞的。

cold.definition: （尤指相對於體溫而言）冷的，寒冷的，溫度低的

college.example_en: I met my husband when we were in college.
college.example_zh: 我跟我丈夫是上大學的時候認識的。

comfortable.definition: （傢俱和衣服）舒適的，舒服的，令人愜意的

command.example_en: You will run forward at (= when you hear) my command.
command.example_zh: 聽到我的命令你們就向前衝。

comment.example_en: I don't want any comments on/about my new haircut, thank you!
comment.example_zh: 我不想聽到誰對我的新髮型說三道四，謝謝各位了！

common.definition: 常見的；經常的；普遍的；普通的；平常的
common.example_en: It's quite common to see couples who dress alike.
common.example_zh: 夫妻衣著相似是司空見慣的事情。

company.example_en: He works for a software company/a company that makes software.
company.example_zh: 他在一家軟體公司工作。

compare.example_en: If you compare house prices in the two areas, it's quite amazing how different they are.
compare.example_zh: 如果比較一下兩個地段的房價，你會驚訝地發現兩者差別竟如此之大。

complain.example_en: Lots of people have complained about the noise.

complaint.example_en: We've received a complaint from one of our listeners about offensive language.
complaint.example_zh: 我們收到了一位聽眾有關用語粗俗的投訴。

complete.example_en: Complete the sentence with one of the adjectives provided.
complete.example_zh: 從所給形容詞中選擇一個使句子變得完整。

concern.example_en: The state of my father's health concerns us greatly.
concern.example_zh: 我父親的健康狀況讓我們非常擔心。

confident.definition: 自信的；有信心的；確信的；有把握的；信任的
confident.example_en: Be a bit more confident in yourself!

conflict.example_en: There was a lot of conflict between him and his father.
conflict.example_zh: 他和父親之間存在著許多分歧。

confuse.example_en: You're confusing him! Tell him slowly and one thing at a time.
confuse.example_zh: 你把他搞糊塗了！慢慢跟他講，一次說一件事。

congratulation.example_zh: 「我應徵那個工作成功了。」「是嗎？ 恭喜你！」

connect.example_en: Can I connect my printer to your computer?
connect.example_zh: 我能把我的印表機連接到你的電腦上嗎？

consider.example_en: Don't make any decisions before you've considered the situation.
consider.example_zh: 在仔細考慮過這個問題之前別作任何決定。

considerate.example_en: It wasn't very considerate of you to drink all the milk.
considerate.example_zh: 牛奶全給你喝光了，真不關心別人。

contact.definition: （尤指經常透過交談、書信的）聯繫，聯絡，交往
contact.example_en: "Have you been in contact with Andrew recently?" "Only by phone."
contact.example_zh: 「你最近跟安德魯聯絡過嗎？」「只是打過電話。」

continue.example_en: It's said that as the boat went down the band continued to play.
continue.example_zh: 據說，船沈時樂隊仍在繼續演奏。

control.example_en: If you can't control your dog, put it on a lead!
control.example_zh: 要是你管不住你的狗，就給它綁上皮帶！

convenient.example_en: Our local shop has very convenient opening hours.
convenient.example_zh: 我們當地的商店營業時間很合宜。

conversation.example_en: She had a strange conversation with the man who moved in upstairs.
conversation.example_zh: 她跟搬到樓上的那個傢夥進行了一次奇怪的交談。

cook.example_en: I don't cook meat very often.

copy.example_en: They've copied the basic design from the Japanese model and added a few of their own refinements.
copy.example_zh: 他們仿照日本模型的基本設計，又加上了一些自己的改良。

corn.definition: （小麥、玉米、燕麥、大麥等）穀物，穀粒

corner.example_en: You go around corners too fast when you're driving!

cost.example_en: When you buy a new computer, you usually get software included at no extra cost (= for no additional money).
cost.example_zh: 買電腦時通常免費附送軟體。

count.example_en: Let's count out loud (= speak the words) from one to ten.
count.example_zh: 我們來大聲地從一數到十。

country.example_en: What is the largest country in Europe?
country.example_zh: 歐洲最大的國家是哪個？

couple.definition: （相似或相同事物的）一對，一雙，幾個;（有某種聯繫之人的）一對，幾個
couple.example_en: The doctor said my leg should be better in a couple of days.
couple.example_zh: 醫生說我的腿過兩天就會好轉。

courage.example_en: They showed great courage when they found out about their baby's disability.
courage.example_zh: 發現自己的嬰兒身有殘疾時，他們表現出了巨大的勇氣。

course.example_en: They're going away on a training course next week.
course.example_zh: 下星期他們要出去上實習課。

court.definition: 法院;法庭;全體出庭人員;（尤指）全體審判人員
court.example_en: Protestors gathered outside the court to await the verdict.
court.example_zh: 抗議者聚集在法庭外等待判決。

cousin.definition: 堂（或表）兄弟;堂（或表）姐妹;遠房親戚
cousin.example_en: My brother's wife and I both had babies around the same time, so the cousins are very close in age.
cousin.example_zh: 我嫂子和我差不多同時生了孩子，因此這對表兄妹年紀相若。

cover.example_en: The light was so bright that I had to cover my eyes.
cover.example_zh: 燈光太亮，我只好遮住眼睛。

cowboy.example_en: The ranch employed ten or twelve cowboys.
cowboy.example_zh: 牧場僱了十一二個牛仔。

crab.example_en: We walked along the beach collecting small crabs.
crab.example_zh: 我們沿著海灘走，一路撿拾小螃蟹。

create.example_en: Charles Schulz created the characters "Snoopy" and "Charlie Brown".
create.example_zh: 查爾斯‧舒爾茨創作了漫畫人物史諾比和查理‧布朗。

crime.example_en: The rate of violent crime fell last month.

cruel.definition: 殘忍的;殘酷的;刻毒傷人的
cruel.example_en: Don't tease him about his weight - it's cruel.
cruel.example_zh: 別拿他的體重開玩笑——這樣太刻薄了。

cry.example_en: I could hear someone crying in the next room.
cry.example_zh: 我能聽見隔壁房間有人在哭。

culture.definition: 文化（尤指某一群體在某一時期普遍的風俗習慣和信仰）
culture.example_en: She's studying modern Japanese language and culture.
culture.example_zh: 她在研究現代日本語言和文化。

cure.example_en: At one time doctors couldn't cure TB/cure people of TB.
cure.example_zh: 醫生曾經無法治癒肺結核／肺結核病人。

curious.example_en: I was curious to know what would happen next.
curious.example_zh: 我很好奇想知道接下來會發生甚麽事。

current.example_en: Have you seen the current issue of (= the most recently published) Vogue magazine?
current.example_zh: 最新一期《時尚》雜誌你看過了嗎？

curtain.example_en: Heavy curtains blocked out the sunlight.
curtain.example_zh: 厚厚的窗簾擋住了陽光。

cut.example_en: to cut a slice of bread

cute.definition: （尤指小東西或小孩）可愛的，嬌小可愛的，逗人喜愛的
cute.example_en: His baby brother is really cute.
cute.example_zh: 他的小寶寶弟弟真的非常可愛。

damage.example_en: Many buildings were badly damaged during the war.
damage.example_zh: 許多建築物在戰爭中嚴重受損。

dangerous.definition: 危險的，有威脅的;不安全的

dark.example_en: It was too dark to see much.

data.example_en: The data was/were collected by various researchers.
data.example_zh: 這些資料是由各類研究人員收集起來的。

date.example_en: What's the date (today)?/What date is it?/What's today's date?

daughter.example_en: Liz and Phil have a daughter and three sons.
daughter.example_zh: 莉茲和菲爾有一個女兒和三個兒子。

dead.example_en: She's been dead for 20 years now.
dead.example_zh: 到現在她已經去世20年了。

deaf.definition: 耳聾的，聽不見的，失聰的
deaf.example_en: He's been totally/partially deaf since birth.
deaf.example_zh: 他一出生就完全失聰／有些聽力障礙。

dear.example_en: She was a very dear friend.
dear.example_zh: 她是一位非常親密的朋友。

death.example_en: The disease causes thousands of deaths a year.
death.example_zh: 這種疾病每年導致數千人死亡。

debate.example_en: Education is the current focus of public debate.
debate.example_zh: 教育是目前大眾談論的焦點。

december.example_en: My parents got married in December.

decide.definition: （尤指仔細考慮後）決定，決斷，確定
decide.example_en: They have to decide by next Friday.
decide.example_zh: 他們必須在下週五前作出決定。

decision.example_en: She has had to make some very difficult decisions.
decision.example_zh: 她必須作出一些非常艱難的決定。

decorate.example_en: They decorated the wedding car with ribbons and flowers.
decorate.example_zh: 他們用絲帶和鮮花裝飾婚車。

decrease.example_en: Our share of the market has decreased sharply this year.
decrease.example_zh: 今年我們的市場份額急劇下降。

deep.definition: 深的，向下延伸的；有…深的

deer.example_en: The park is home to a large herd of deer.

degree.example_en: This job demands a high degree of skill.
degree.example_zh: 這項工作對技術的要求很高。

delicious.definition: 美味的;（味道或氣味）誘人的

deliver.example_en: Mail is delivered to our office twice a day.
deliver.example_zh: 郵差每天給我們辦公室投遞兩次郵件。

dentist.example_en: You should have your teeth checked by a dentist at least twice a year.
dentist.example_zh: 你每年至少應該請牙科醫生檢查兩次牙齒。

deny.example_en: He will not confirm or deny the allegations.
deny.example_zh: 對那些指控他將不置可否。

department.definition: （組織或機構中的）部，系，處，科，室
department.example_en: the chemistry department/the department of chemistry

depend.example_en: Whether or not we go to Mexico for our holiday depends on the cost.
depend.example_zh: 我們去不去墨西哥度假取決於需要花費多少錢。

describe.example_zh: 你能描述一下襲擊你的人的樣子嗎？

desert.example_en: They were lost in the desert for nine days.
desert.example_zh: 他們在沙漠裡迷路已經有9天了。

design.example_zh: 是誰設計的這座建築物／這款裙子／這套傢俱？

desire.example_en: I desire only to be left in peace.
desire.example_zh: 我只想清清靜靜地不受打擾。

desk.definition: （常指帶抽屜的）書桌，辦公桌，寫字枱

detect.definition: （尤指用特殊方法）發現，察覺，看出
detect.example_en: Some sounds cannot be detected by the human ear.
detect.example_zh: 有些聲音是人的耳朵無法察覺到的。

develop.example_en: It became clear that he wasn't developing like all the other little boys.
develop.example_zh: 顯然他沒有像其他小男孩那樣正常生長發育。

dial.example_en: Can I dial this number direct, or do I have to go through the operator?
dial.example_zh: 我可以直接撥這個號碼還是需要透過話務員接轉？

diamond.example_en: The tiara was set with diamonds and rubies.
diamond.example_zh: 頭飾上鑲嵌著鑽石和紅寶石。

diary.example_en: While in hiding, Anne Frank kept a diary.
diary.example_zh: 安妮‧法蘭克在躲匿期間堅持寫日記

die.example_en: Twelve people died in the accident.
die.example_zh: 十二人在此次事故中喪生。

diet.example_en: Diet varies between different countries in the world.
diet.example_zh: 世界各國的飲食各不相同。

difference.example_en: What's the difference between an ape and a monkey?

different.definition: 不同的，不一樣的，有差別的
different.example_en: She seems to wear something different every day.
different.example_zh: 她似乎每天都穿不一樣的衣服。

difficult.example_zh: 難題／艱難的選擇／艱巨的任務／難學的語言

difficulty.example_en: We finished the job, but only with great difficulty.
difficulty.example_zh: 我們非常艱難地完成了工作。

dig.example_en: Digging (in) the garden is good exercise.
dig.example_zh: 在花園裡挖土是一種很好的鍛煉。

diligent.definition: 認真刻苦的，勤奮的，勤勞的

dinner.definition: 正餐（通常指晚餐，在英國有時指午餐）

dinosaur.example_en: This computer's a dinosaur, isn't it?
dinosaur.example_zh: 這種電腦有點過時了，不是嗎？

direction.example_en: "No, go that way," I said, pointing in the opposite direction.
direction.example_zh: 「不對，往那邊走，」我一邊說一邊指著相反的方向。

dirty.example_en: Her face was dirty and tear-stained.
dirty.example_zh: 她的臉很髒，還留有淚痕。

disagree.example_en: I'm afraid I have to disagree with you (on that issue).
disagree.example_zh: （關於那個問題）恐怕我不能同意你的看法。

disappear.example_en: The search was called off for the sailors who disappeared in the storm.
disappear.example_zh: 搜尋在風暴中失蹤水手的行動被取消了。

discuss.example_en: The police want to discuss these recent racist attacks with local people.
discuss.example_zh: 警方希望與當地人討論近期發生的種族主義襲擊事件。

discussion.example_en: We will hold/have discussions with employee representatives about possible redundancies.
discussion.example_zh: 我們將與僱員代表討論裁員的可能性。

dishonest.definition: 不誠實的，不老實的，不正直的

distance.example_en: What's the distance between Madrid and Barcelona/from Madrid to Barcelona?
distance.example_zh: 馬德里和巴賽隆那相距有多遠？

divide.example_en: At the end of the lecture, I'd like all the students to divide into small discussion groups.
divide.example_zh: 講座結束後，我想讓所有學生分成幾個討論小組。

dizzy.definition: 眩暈的，頭暈目眩的，眼花繚亂的
dizzy.example_en: Going without sleep for a long time makes me feel dizzy and light-headed.
dizzy.example_zh: 長時間不睡覺讓我覺得頭暈目眩。

dog.definition: （尤指當作寵物或用來打獵、看護的）狗，犬

dollar.definition: （美國、加拿大、澳大利亞、紐西蘭等國的貨幣單位）元

dot.example_en: The full stop at the end of this sentence is a dot.
dot.example_zh: 這個句子末尾的句號是一個小圓點。

double.example_en: I ordered a double espresso (= two standard amounts in one cup).
double.example_zh: 我點了一杯雙份的濃縮咖啡。

doubt.definition: （尤指對好壞、真實性的）懷疑，疑慮，疑問
doubt.example_en: I'm having doubts about his ability to do the job.
doubt.example_zh: 我對他是否能勝任此項工作還有一些疑問。

doughnut.definition: 炸麵包圈;炸果醬麵包;甜甜圈

down.example_zh: 這部電梯是向下開的嗎？

downstairs.definition: 朝樓下，在樓下（尤指底層）
downstairs.example_en: I went downstairs to answer the phone.

downtown.definition: 在市中心（的）;朝市中心（的）

drag.example_en: Pick the chair up instead of dragging it behind you!
drag.example_zh: 把椅子拿起來，不要在地上拖！

drama.example_en: She's starred in several TV dramas.

draw.example_zh: 喬納森的畫畫得相當棒。

drawer.example_en: I keep my socks in the bottom drawer.
drawer.example_zh: 我把襪子放在最下麵的抽屜裡。

drink.example_en: Would you like a drink of water/tea/juice?

drug.example_zh: 抗癌／治療不育症／止痛藥

dry.example_en: I hung his wet trousers on the radiator, but they're not dry yet.
dry.example_zh: 我把他的濕褲子掛在散熱器上了，但現在還沒乾呢。

duck.example_en: The ducks started quacking loudly when we threw them some bread.

dumb.example_en: Children like this used to be described as "deaf and dumb".

dumpling.example_en: We had lamb stew and dumplings.

during.example_en: They work during the night and sleep by day.
during.example_zh: 他們夜裡工作，白天睡覺。

duty.example_en: The duty of the agency is to act in the best interests of the child.
duty.example_zh: 這個機構的責任就是爲孩子謀取最大利益。

each.definition: （兩個或兩個以上物或人中的）每個，各，各自
each.example_en: When you run, each foot leaves the ground before the other comes down.
each.example_zh: 奔跑時，你的一隻腳在另一隻腳著地之前就離開了地面。

ear.example_en: The hearing in my left ear's not so good.

early.definition: 早期的，初期的;在早期，在初期;提早（的），提前（的）
early.example_en: If you finish early you can go home.
early.example_zh: 如果提前完成你可以回家。

earth.example_en: The earth takes approximately 3651/4 days to go round the sun.
earth.example_zh: 地球圍繞太陽運轉一周大約需要365又1/4天

ease.example_en: To ease the problem of overcrowding, new prisons will be built.
ease.example_zh: 爲了緩解監獄裡人滿爲患的情況，將修建新的監獄。

east.example_en: The points of the compass are north, south, east, and west.
east.example_zh: 指南針上的四個方位點是北、南、東和西。

eastern.definition: （某個地區的）東部的;來自東部的
eastern.example_en: The eastern part of the country is very mountainous.
eastern.example_zh: 這個國家的東部地區多山。

edge.example_en: He put pink icing around the edge of the cake.
edge.example_zh: 他用粉色的糖霜沿蛋糕邊擠花。

education.definition: 教育;受教育獲得的知識
education.example_en: As a child he received most of his education at home.
education.example_zh: 童年時他主要在家中接受教育。

effect.example_en: The radiation leak has had a disastrous effect on/upon the environment.
effect.example_zh: 核輻射外泄給環境帶來了災難性的影響。

effort.example_en: If we could all make an effort to keep this office tidier it would help.
effort.example_zh: 如果我們都努力保持整潔，那麽辦公室的面貌肯定會大有改觀。

eight.example_en: She was eight (years old) when her family moved here.
eight.example_zh: 八歲那年，她家搬到了這裡。

eighteen.example_en: You are allowed to vote at eighteen (= when you are 18 years old)
eighteen.example_zh: 你十八歲的時候開始有選舉權。

elder.definition: （尤指在社會上地位高、受人尊敬的）長者，長輩，老年人
elder.example_en: You should listen to the advice of your elders.

elect.example_en: The President is elected for a four-year term of office.

electric.example_zh: 電熱氈／電動汽車／電水壺／電燈

eleven.example_en: There are eleven girls in my class and ten boys.
eleven.example_zh: 我班上有11個女生和10個男生。

else.definition: （用於以 any-，every-，no- 和 some- 開頭的詞後面，或用於 how，what，where，who，why 之後，但不用於 which 之後）其他，另外，別的
else.example_en: Everybody else has (= all the other people have) agreed except for you.
else.example_zh: 除了你其他人都同意了。

embarrass.example_en: You're embarrassing him with your compliments!
embarrass.example_zh: 你的讚美之詞使他很不好意思。

emotion.example_en: Like a lot of men, he finds it hard to express his emotions.
emotion.example_zh: 像很多男人一樣，他不大會表達自己的感情。

emphasize.example_en: I'd just like to emphasize how important it is for people to learn foreign languages.
emphasize.example_zh: 我只是想強調一下學習外語的重要性。

employ.example_en: How many people does your company employ?
employ.example_zh: 你們公司僱有多少員工？

end.example_en: This cable should have a plug at one end and a socket at the other.
end.example_zh: 這根電纜應該一端有插頭，另一端有插座。

enemy.example_en: He's made a few enemies in this company.
enemy.example_zh: 他在公司中和幾個人結了怨。

energetic.definition: 精力充沛的;充滿活力的

energy.example_en: Since I started eating more healthily I've got so much more energy.
energy.example_zh: 自從更加注意飲食健康以來，我精力愈發充沛了。

engineer.definition: 工程師;工程（或機械）設計人員

enjoy.example_zh: 我真的很喜歡那部電影／那本書／那場音樂會／那次派對／那頓飯。

enough.example_en: Is there enough dessert/Are there enough desserts for everyone?

enter.example_en: The police entered (the building) through/by the side door.
enter.example_zh: 警察從側門進入（這座大樓）。

entrance.example_en: There are two entrances - one at the front and one around the back.
entrance.example_zh: 入口有兩個，一個在前面，另一個在後面。

environment.example_en: Certain chemicals have been banned because of their damaging effect on the environment.
environment.example_zh: 一些化學品因對環境有破壞作用已被禁止使用。

envy.example_en: I envy her ability to talk to people she's never met before.
envy.example_zh: 她與人初次見面就能侃侃而談，這真讓我羡慕。

equal.example_en: One litre is equal to 1.76 imperial pints.

eraser.example_en: If you draw or write in pencil you can always rub out your mistakes with an eraser.
eraser.example_zh: 如果你用鉛筆寫字畫畫，無論出了甚麽錯都可以用橡皮擦擦掉。

error.example_en: He admitted that he'd made an error.

especially.example_en: She's not especially interested in sport.
especially.example_zh: 她對體育運動不是特別感興趣。

eve.example_en: Mrs Clayton was speaking to Arab journalists in Paris on the eve of her visit to Egypt.
eve.example_zh: 克萊頓夫人在出訪埃及前夕在巴黎與阿拉伯記者進行了交談。

even.definition: （用來表示令人驚訝、不同尋常、出乎意料或極端的事物）甚至，連，即使
even.example_en: I don't even know where it is.
even.example_zh: 我甚至連它在哪裡都不知道。

event.definition: （尤指重大或不尋常的）事情，事件
event.example_en: This year's Olympic Games will be the biggest ever sporting event.
event.example_zh: 今年的奧林匹克運動會將是歷史上規模最大的體育盛事。

ever.example_en: Nothing ever happens here in the evening.
ever.example_zh: 這兒晚上從來沒發生過甚麽事兒。

every.definition: （三個或三個以上的人或事物組成的群體中的）每一個，每個；全部，整體
every.example_en: The police want to interview every employee about the theft.
every.example_zh: 警方想就竊盜案件與每位員工面談。

evil.definition: 道德敗壞的;邪惡的，惡毒的;討厭的

exam.example_en: American students ranked fourth in those taking the geography exam.
exam.example_zh: 美國學生在參加地理考試的學生中名列第四。

example.example_en: Could you give me an example of the improvements you have mentioned?
example.example_zh: 你可不可以舉個例子說明一下你剛剛提到的那些進展情況？

excellent.definition: 卓越的；優秀的；傑出的；極好的

except.example_en: The museum is open daily except Monday(s).
except.example_zh: 博物館除了星期一之外每日都開放。

excite.definition: 激發（情感）；使激動；使興奮
excite.example_en: Nothing about my life excites me at present.
excite.example_zh: 我目前的生活就好像一潭死水。

excuse.example_en: Please excuse me for arriving late - the bus was delayed.
excuse.example_zh: 我來遲了，請原諒——因為公車延誤了。

exercise.example_en: Swimming is my favourite form of exercise.
exercise.example_zh: 我最喜歡的運動是游泳。

exit.definition: （建築物或大型交通工具的）出口，安全門;（尤指演員）退場
exit.example_en: We headed for the nearest exit.

expect.example_en: We are expecting a lot of applicants for the job.
expect.example_zh: 我們預計會有很多人來應徵這份工作。

expensive.definition: 昂貴的；用錢多的；價格高的
expensive.example_zh: 勞斯萊斯汽車價格昂貴。

experience.example_en: Do you have any experience of working with kids? (= Have you ever worked with them?)
experience.example_zh: 你有照顧小孩的工作經驗嗎？

explain.example_en: If there's anything you don't understand, I'll be happy to explain.
explain.example_zh: 如果你有甚麼不明白的地方，我很樂意為你講解。

express.example_zh: 她眼神中流露出深切的悲傷。

extra.example_en: If you need any extra help, just call me.
extra.example_zh: 如果還需要其他的幫助，儘管打電話給我。

eye.example_en: He has no sight in his left eye.

eyebrow.example_en: Do you pluck your eyebrows (= remove some of the hairs to change their shape)?

face.example_en: She has a long, thin face.

fact.definition: 現實，實際情況；（尤指）事實，真相
fact.example_en: No decision will be made until we know all the facts.
fact.example_zh: 了解全部事實前我們不會作任何決定。

fail.example_en: She moved to London in the hope of finding work as a model, but failed.
fail.example_zh: 她搬到倫敦，希望找份模特兒的工作，但沒找到。

fair.definition: 合理的；公平的；公正的；平等待人的

fall.example_en: The path's very steep, so be careful you don't fall.

family.example_en: A new family has/have moved in next door.

fan.example_en: More than 15,000 Liverpool fans attended Saturday's game.
fan.example_zh: 超過15 000名利物浦隊球迷週六到現場觀看了比賽。

fancy.example_en: Do you fancy a drink this evening?

fantastic.example_en: You look fantastic in that dress.
fantastic.example_zh: 你穿著那條連身裙看起來棒極了。

far.example_en: How far is it from Australia to New Zealand?
far.example_zh: 從澳大利亞到紐西蘭有多遠？

fashion.definition: （尤指服裝、髮型、妝容的）流行款式，時興式樣
fashion.example_en: Long hair is back in fashion for men.

fat.example_en: He eats all the time but he never gets fat.
fat.example_zh: 他總是在吃，但從來不長胖。

father.example_en: My father took me to watch the football every Saturday.
father.example_zh: 我父親每週六帶我去看足球賽。

fault.example_en: It's not my fault she didn't come!

fear.example_en: Trembling with fear, she handed over the money to the gunman.
fear.example_zh: 她嚇得發抖，戰戰兢兢地把錢遞給了持槍歹徒。

february.example_en: Construction is expected to start in February.
february.example_zh: 預計建造工作二月份開始。

feed.definition: 給（人、團體或動物）提供食物;餵養
feed.example_en: I usually feed the neighbour's cat while she's away.
feed.example_zh: 鄰居不在家時，我經常替她餵貓。

feel.example_en: "How are you feeling?" "Not too bad, but I've still got a slight headache."
feel.example_zh: 「你感覺如何？」「不算太糟，但我還是有點輕微的頭痛。」

feeling.example_en: I had a tingling feeling in my fingers.

female.definition: 女性的；婦女的；雌的；母的
female.example_en: Female lions do not have manes.

festival.example_zh: 猶太教／基督教／印度教節日

fever.example_en: He's got a headache and a slight fever.

few.definition: （用於 quite a few, a good few 等表達方式中）許多，很多，大量
few.example_en: I need to get a few things in town.
few.example_zh: 我需要到城裡買幾樣東西。

fifteen.example_en: They live about fifteen miles away.
fifteen.example_zh: 他們住在大約15英里以外的地方。

fight.example_en: There were children fighting in the playground.
fight.example_zh: 當時操場上有些孩子在打架。

fill.definition: （使）充滿，（使）裝滿，（使）注滿；佔據；布滿
fill.example_en: I filled the bucket with water.

finally.example_en: We finally got home at midnight.
finally.example_zh: 我們終於在午夜時分到了家。

find.definition: （偶然）發現，碰上；找到，尋得；找出，查明
find.example_en: I've just found a ten-pound note in my pocket.
find.example_zh: 我剛在口袋裡找到了一張十英鎊的鈔票。

fine.definition: 好的;夠好的;健康的，身體好的
fine.example_en: I felt terrible last night but I feel fine this morning.
fine.example_zh: 我昨晚感覺很不舒服，但今天早上就好了。

finger.example_en: He noticed her long delicate fingers.
finger.example_zh: 他注意到她纖細修長的手指。

finish.example_en: I'll call you when I've finished my homework.
finish.example_zh: 我做完作業後會給你打電話。

fire.example_en: Animals are usually afraid of fire.

first.definition: 第一（的）;首先;最初;首要（的）
first.example_en: This is my first visit to New York.

fish.example_en: Several large fish live in the pond.

fisherman.definition: 抓魚（或釣魚）的人;（尤指）漁民

fit.example_zh: 那件外套你穿著很合身。

five.example_en: Five, four, three, two, one, blast-off!

fix.example_en: They couldn't fix my old computer, so I bought a new one.
fix.example_zh: 他們修不好我的舊電腦了，所以我買了臺新的。

flag.example_en: Flags of all the participating countries are flying outside the stadium.
flag.example_zh: 所有參賽國家的國旗都飄揚在體育場外。

flash.example_en: Stop flashing that light in my eyes!
flash.example_zh: 別拿那個手電筒晃我的眼睛了！

flashlight.example_en: She shone the flashlight into the dark room.
flashlight.example_zh: 她用手電筒照了照黑暗的房間。

flight.example_en: I'll never forget my first flight.
flight.example_zh: 我永遠也不會忘記第一次乘飛機的經歷。

flood.example_en: Our washing machine broke down yesterday and flooded the kitchen.
flood.example_zh: 我們的洗衣機昨天壞了，把廚房裡弄得到處是水。

floor.example_en: The floor was partly covered with a dirty old rug.
floor.example_zh: 部分地板上鋪著骯髒的舊地毯。

flour.example_en: Thicken the sauce with a little flour.

fly.example_en: The poor bird couldn't fly because it had a broken wing.

freedom.example_zh: 獨自一人呆在山上，我感到非常自在。

fresh.example_zh: 原來的命令撤銷了，我又接到了新的指令。

gain.definition: （尤指經過一段時間逐漸）取得，獲得，贏得，博得

gate.definition: （通常由金屬條或木頭條板做的）大門，柵欄門，圍牆門

gate.example_zh: 如果防護門沒有關好，電梯不會開動。

gather.example_zh: 我去了數家圖書館去搜集有關這一計劃的資料。

giant.example_zh: 他是本世紀知識界的巨擘／政界巨頭之一。

girl.example_en: Two girls showed us round the classrooms.

give.example_en: She gave us a set of saucepans as a wedding present.
give.example_zh: 她送我的結婚禮物是一套深平底鍋。

glad.example_en: We were glad about her success.

grandfather.example_en: Her grandfather on her mother's side was Italian.

greet.definition: 問候；迎接；向…打招呼；對…作出反應

ground.example_en: I sat down on the ground.

group.example_en: I'm meeting a group of friends for dinner tonight.

guess.example_en: I didn't know the answer, so I had to guess.

guest.example_en: 150 guests were invited to the wedding.

guitar.example_en: He sat on the grass, strumming his guitar.

gun.example_en: The British police do not carry guns.

gym.example_en: I go to the gym twice a week.
gym.example_zh: 我每週去兩次健身俱樂部。

habit.example_en: I always buy the same brand of toothpaste out of (= because of) habit.

hall.example_zh: 我把袋子掉在大廳裡了。

hammer.example_en: She qualified for the women's hammer final.

hand.example_en: All their toys are made by hand.

handkerchief.example_en: She took out her handkerchief and blew her nose loudly.

handsome.example_en: Her dream is to be whisked off her feet by a tall, dark, handsome stranger.
handsome.example_zh: 她夢想自己被一位高大黝黑的英俊陌生男子迷得神魂顛倒。

helpful.definition: 願意幫忙的;有幫助的，有用的

helpful.example_zh: 她可真是個討人喜歡又樂於助人的孩子！

history.example_zh: 我在大學裡學的是歐洲現代史。

hobby.example_en: Angela's hobby is restoring vintage motorcycles.
hobby.example_zh: 安吉拉的業餘愛好是修復舊型機車。

hole.example_en: We dug a hole and planted the tree.
hole.example_zh: 我們挖了個坑栽下了那棵樹。

home.example_zh: 這位參議員有兩個家——一個是位於華盛頓的公寓，另一個是科羅拉多的家。

homework.example_en: You can't watch TV until you've done your homework.
homework.example_zh: 做完功課之後你才能看電視。

hope.example_zh: 我盼望著下星期有一次面試。

how.example_en: How do we get to the town from here?

however.example_en: However hungry I am, I never seem to be able to finish off a whole pizza.

huge.example_zh: 他們住在一棟很大的房子裡。

humble.example_en: He's very humble about his success.

humid.definition: （空氣和天氣狀況）潮濕的，濕潤的

hunger.example_zh: 我無法相信那麼豐富的飯菜也不能填飽你的肚子。

hungry.example_zh: 到四點鐘的時候我覺得肚子非常餓。

husband.example_zh: 我從未見過費歐娜的丈夫。

ice.example_en: The pond was covered in ice all winter.
ice.example_zh: 這個池塘整個冬天都結著冰。

ignore.example_zh: 她有時會特別煩人，不過我盡量不去理會她。

ill.example_zh: 我感到不舒服，於是就回家了。

imagine.example_en: Imagine Robert Redford when he was young - that's what John looks like.

importance.example_zh: 健康報告強調了飲食中新鮮食物的重要性。

improve.example_en: He did a lot to improve conditions for factory workers.
improve.example_zh: 他為改善工廠工人的工作條件做了許多工作。

inch.definition: 英寸（約合2.54厘米，有時用符號''表示）

include.example_en: The bill includes tax and service.
include.example_zh: 帳單包括稅款和服務費。

income.example_en: Average incomes have risen by 4.5 percent over the past year.
income.example_zh: 人均收入比去年上升了4.5%。

increase.example_en: Incidents of armed robbery have increased over the last few years.
increase.example_zh: 持械搶劫案近幾年增多了。

indicate.example_en: Exploratory investigations have indicated large amounts of oil below the sea bed.
indicate.example_zh: 勘測調查顯示海床下有大量的石油。

influence.definition: 影響，作用；有影響的人（或物）
influence.example_en: Helen's a bad/good influence on him.
influence.example_zh: 海倫對他有不良／好的影響。

information.example_zh: 你知道有關火車時刻的資訊嗎？

insect.example_en: Ants, beetles, butterflies, and flies are all insects.
insect.example_zh: 螞蟻、甲蟲、蝴蝶和蒼蠅都是昆蟲。

inside.example_zh: 你把車內部擦乾淨了嗎？

insist.example_en: Greg still insists (that) he did nothing wrong.
insist.example_zh: 葛列格仍堅稱自己沒有做錯任何事。

inspire.example_en: His confident leadership inspired his followers.
inspire.example_zh: 他那自信的領導風采激勵著他的追隨者。

instance.example_en: There have been several instances of violence at the school.
instance.example_zh: 學校裡發生過幾次暴力事件。

instant.example_en: This type of account offers you instant access to your money.
instant.example_zh: 這種帳戶允許隨時支取存款。

intelligent.definition: 有才智的;聰穎的，理解力強的
intelligent.example_en: He is a highly intelligent person who can think outside the box.

interest.example_en: I've always had an interest in astronomy.
interest.example_zh: 我一直對天文學感興趣。

interested.example_en: He didn't seem very interested in what I was saying.
interested.example_zh: 他好像對我的話不怎麼感興趣。

interesting.example_zh: 她是一個很有趣的女人。

internet.example_en: Use your phone to connect to the internet.

interrupt.example_en: She tried to explain what had happened but he kept interrupting her.
interrupt.example_zh: 她試圖解釋所發生的事情，但他不停地打斷她。

into.example_en: Would you put the jar back into the cupboard for me, please?
into.example_zh: 請幫我把罐子放回碗櫥裡，好嗎？

introduce.definition: 採用;引進;推行;放入，插入

introduce.example_zh: 自從2001年首次推出該產品以來，蘋果公司已經售出了成百上千萬台iPod。

invent.example_zh: 第一把安全剃刀由公司創辦人金恩‧坎普‧吉列於1903年發明。

invitation.example_zh: 謝謝你邀請我參加你的生日聚會。

invite.example_zh: 我們受邀參加洛拉的晚會。

jealous.definition: 妒忌的；好妒忌的；吃醋的

jeep.definition: （尤指軍隊用的）吉普車，越野車

jog.definition: 慢跑（尤指作為健身鍛煉的方式）

join.example_zh: 一座長長的吊橋將兩座島嶼連接起來。

joke.example_en: Did I tell you the joke about the chicken crossing the road?
joke.example_zh: 我跟你講過小雞過馬路的笑話嗎？

joy.example_en: They were filled with joy when their first child was born.
joy.example_zh: 第一個孩子出生時，他們滿心歡喜。

juice.example_zh: 柳橙／檸檬／葡萄／胡蘿蔔汁

july.example_en: The film festival is in July.

jump.example_en: The children were jumping up and down with excitement.
jump.example_zh: 孩子都興奮地跳來跳去。

june.example_en: A lot of people get married in June.

keep.example_en: Do you want this photograph back or can I keep it?
keep.example_zh: 你想要回這張照片，還是我留著它？

ketchup.example_en: Do you want some ketchup with your burger?

kill.example_zh: 她的父母死於一次空難。

kitchen.example_en: We usually eat breakfast in the kitchen.
kitchen.example_zh: 我們通常在廚房吃早餐。

knee.example_zh: 嬰兒用手和膝蓋著地爬來爬去。

knock.example_zh: 她敲窗想引起他的注意。

knowledge.definition: 知識;學問;學識;了解;理解
knowledge.example_en: Her knowledge of English grammar is very extensive.
knowledge.example_zh: 她的英語文法知識很廣博。

lack.example_en: Her only problem is a lack of confidence.
lack.example_zh: 她唯一的問題是缺乏自信。

lady.example_en: There's a young lady here to see you.
lady.example_zh: 這裡有位年輕的女士要見你。

lake.example_en: We used to go boating on that lake.
lake.example_zh: 我們過去常去那個湖裡划船。

lamb.example_en: lambs gambolling about in the fields
lamb.example_zh: 在牧場上跳來跳去的一群羊羔

land.example_en: It is cheaper to drill for oil on land than at sea.
land.example_zh: 在陸地上鑽探石油比在海上更經濟。

language.example_zh: 她研究兒童是如何習得語言的。

last.example_en: I hate being the last one to arrive at a meeting.
last.example_zh: 我不願意開會時最後一個到。

late.definition: 末期的，晚期的；接近終了

latest.definition: 最新的;最近的;最先進的
latest.example_en: Have you seen her latest movie?
latest.example_zh: 你看過她的最新電影嗎？

laugh.example_zh: 聽了她講的笑話他們都笑了。

law.definition: 法，法律;法律制度，法律體系
law.example_en: There are laws against drinking in the street.
law.example_zh: 有法律禁止在街上喝酒。

lawyer.example_en: I want to see my lawyer before I say anything.

lay.example_en: She laid the baby on the bed.

lazy.example_en: Managers had complained that the workers were lazy and unreliable.
lazy.example_zh: 經理們抱怨工人們懶惰而且不可靠。

lead.example_en: I think we've chosen the right person to lead the expedition.
lead.example_zh: 我認為我們已經找到了帶領這支探險隊的合適人選。

least.example_en: This group is the least likely of the four to win.
least.example_zh: 該組在四個小組當中獲勝的可能性最小。

leave.example_en: I'll be leaving at five o'clock tomorrow.

left.example_en: His left eye was heavily bandaged.
left.example_zh: 他的左眼被嚴嚴實實地包紮了起來。

leg.example_en: My legs were tired after so much walking.
leg.example_zh: 走了這麽遠的路，我的腿有些累了。

legal.definition: 法律的，法律上的，法律方面的

lemon.example_en: For this recipe you need the juice of two lemons.
lemon.example_zh: 按照這份食譜，你需要兩個檸檬的果汁。

lend.example_en: She doesn't like lending her books.
lend.example_zh: 她不喜歡把書借給別人。

less.example_en: We must try to spend less money.
less.example_zh: 我們必須儘量少花一些錢。

lesson.example_en: How can we make science lessons more interesting?
lesson.example_zh: 我們怎樣才能把理科課程講得更有趣一些呢?

let.example_en: She wanted to go but her parents wouldn't let her.

level.example_en: The water level in the lake is much higher after heavy rain.
level.example_zh: 暴雨過後這個湖的水位上升了很多。

lick.example_en: He licked the chocolate off his fingers.
lick.example_zh: 他把手指上的巧克力舔乾淨了。

lid.example_en: Can you get the lid off this jar?
lid.example_zh: 你能把罐子的蓋打開嗎？

life.definition: 壽命;生命;一生，人生;生活;性命

life.example_zh: 人生短暫，何必為金錢而煩惱！

lift.example_zh: 你能幫我抬一下桌子嗎？

likely.definition: 很可能的，可能要發生的

likely.example_zh: 一定要提醒我，因爲我可能會忘記。

lily.example_en: Two identical large vases of lilies framed the fireplace.

limit.example_en: Is there a limit on the amount of money you can claim?
limit.example_zh: 你能索賠到的金額有上限嗎？

link.example_en: There's a direct link between diet and heart disease.
link.example_zh: 日常飲食與心臟病有直接的關係。

lip.example_en: She kissed me on the lips.

liquid.example_en: Mercury is a liquid at room temperature.

listen.example_en: What kind of music do you listen to?

little.example_en: It came in a little box.
little.example_zh: 它是裝在一個小盒子裡送來的。

live.example_en: He only lived a few days after the accident.
live.example_zh: 出事後他只活了幾天就死了。

lock.example_en: I heard someone turn a key in the lock.
lock.example_zh: 我聽見有人在用鎖匙開門。

locker.example_en: We had several hours to wait for our train, so we left our bags in a (luggage) locker, and went to look around the town.
locker.example_zh: 由於還得等好幾個小時的火車，我們就把袋子存到衣物櫃後到城裡轉了轉。

lonely.example_en: She gets lonely now that all the kids have left home.
lonely.example_zh: 現在孩子們都離開了家，她感到有些孤獨。

loser.example_en: The losers of both games will play each other for third place.
loser.example_zh: 兩場比賽的負者將爭奪第三名。

loud.example_zh: 巨大的爆炸聲／巨大的吵鬧聲／洪亮的嗓音

lover.example_en: They were friends before they became lovers.
lover.example_zh: 他們最初是朋友，後來成了情人。

luck.example_en: It was just luck that I asked for a job at the right time.
luck.example_zh: 真是機緣巧合，我剛好在合適的時機開口說想找份工作。

lucky.definition: 幸運的，走運的，運氣好的

machine.example_en: The different sizes of eggs are sorted by a machine.
machine.example_zh: 雞蛋由機器按大小分撿。

mad.definition: 瘋的，神經錯亂的，精神失常的

mad.example_zh: 你發瘋了，晚上這個時候獨自一人走回家。

magazine.example_en: She has written articles for several women's magazines.
magazine.example_zh: 她為幾家女性雜誌撰稿。

magic.example_en: The group is known for its belief in witchcraft and magic.
magic.example_zh: 這個組織以相信巫術和魔法而出名。

magician.example_en: Merlin was the magician in the stories of King Arthur and the Knights of the Round Table.
magician.example_zh: 梅林是「亞瑟王與圓桌武士」故事中的巫師。

mail.example_en: She spent the morning reading and answering her mail.
mail.example_zh: 她花了一個上午處理信件。

main.definition: 主要的；最重要的；最大的
main.example_en: The main thing is not to worry.

maintain.example_en: The army has been brought in to maintain order in the region.
maintain.example_zh: 軍隊已調配到這個地區來維持秩序。

major.definition: 較重要的；主要的；重大的
major.example_en: All of her major plays have been translated into English.
major.example_zh: 她的主要劇本都被譯成了英文。

make.example_en: Do you want me to make some coffee?

male.definition: 男（性）的；男子的；雄性的，公的

mall.definition: （車輛不得入內的）商業街，購物中心
mall.example_en: There are plans to build a new mall in the middle of town.
mall.example_zh: 計劃在市中心興建一個新的購物中心。

manner.example_en: She stared at me in an accusing manner.
manner.example_zh: 她以責備的目光注視著我。

many.definition: 許多（主要用於否定句和疑問句中，或者帶有「too」、「so」和「as」 等的句子中）

march.example_en: She's going on a march on Saturday in protest over the closure of the hospital.
march.example_zh: 她將在週六參加一個反對關閉醫院的示威遊行。

mark.example_en: There were dirty marks on her trousers where she had wiped her hands.
mark.example_zh: 她褲子上抹過手的地方留下了汙漬。

market.example_en: Are you sure there's a market for the product?
market.example_zh: 你肯定這種產品有市場嗎？

marriage.example_en: They had a long and happy marriage.
marriage.example_zh: 他們的婚姻長久而幸福。

marry.example_en: Men tend to marry later than women.
marry.example_zh: 男性成婚往往晚於女性。

marvelous.example_en: He's done a marvellous job of the decorating.
marvelous.example_zh: 他所做的裝飾真是棒極了。

mass.definition: 大量的；大規模的；大批的

master.example_en: With careful training, a dog will obey its master completely.
master.example_zh: 經過精心訓練的狗會完全服從主人的命令。

mat.example_en: Wipe your feet on the mat before you come inside.
mat.example_zh: 你進來前先在地墊上擦擦腳。

mate.example_en: Peacocks use their beautiful tails to attract mates.
mate.example_zh: 孔雀用美麗的尾巴來吸引配偶。

matter.example_en: Could I talk to you about a personal matter?

maximum.example_zh: 最高速度／最大努力／最高溫度

may.example_en: There may be other problems that we don't know about.
may.example_zh: 可能有我們不知道的其他問題。

meaning.example_en: The word "flight" has two different meanings: a plane journey, and the act of running away.
meaning.example_zh: flight 一詞有兩個不同的意思：航程和逃跑。

measure.example_en: "Will the table fit in here?" "I don't know - let's measure it."
measure.example_zh: 「這裡放得下這張桌子嗎？」「我不知道──我們來量一下吧。」

meet.example_zh: 他們是在工作時認識的。

meeting.example_en: We're having a meeting on Thursday to discuss the problem.
meeting.example_zh: 我們將在週四會面討論這個問題。

menu.example_en: The waiter brought the menu and the wine list.
menu.example_zh: 侍者拿來了菜單和酒單。

message.example_en: If I'm not there when you call, leave a message.
message.example_zh: 如果你打電話時我不在，就留個口信。

metal.example_en: Metal, paper, and glass can be recycled.
metal.example_zh: 金屬、紙張和玻璃都可以再利用。

meter.example_en: The electricity meter is in the basement.

method.example_en: Travelling by train is still one of the safest methods of transport.
method.example_zh: 乘坐火車仍是最安全的交通出行方式之一。

microwave.example_zh: 把魚放到微波爐裡，只需五分鐘就可以了。

middle.example_en: This is my class photo - I'm the one in the middle.

million.example_en: The city has a population of almost a/one million.
million.example_zh: 這座城市的人口幾乎有一百萬。

mind.example_en: Her mind was full of what had happened the night before, and she just wasn't concentrating.
mind.example_zh: 她腦海裡滿是前一天晚上所發生的事情，根本無法集中精神。

mine.definition: 我的（所有物）;屬於我的（東西）;與我有關的（人）

minor.definition: 較不重要的；次要的；輕微的

miss.definition: 未做到；未體驗；避開；倖免於

miss.example_zh: 我上課遲到了，因為我搭的公車來遲了。

mistake.example_en: I'm not blaming you - we all make mistakes.
mistake.example_zh: 我不是在責備你——我們都會犯錯。

mix.example_en: Oil and water don't mix. Even if you shake them together they separate into two layers.
mix.example_zh: 油與水不相融。即使你將其混在一起搖晃，它們也會分為兩層。

model.example_en: The educational system was a model for those of many other countries.
model.example_zh: 這種教育體制是許多其他國家學習的榜樣。

modern.example_zh: 現代科技／建築／醫學／藝術

monday.example_en: I start my new job on Monday.
monday.example_zh: 週一我將開始我的新工作。

money.example_en: "How much money do you have on you?" "€100 in notes and a few coins."
money.example_zh: 「你帶了多少錢？」「一共100歐元的紙鈔，還有一些硬幣。」

monkey.example_en: They ate all the cakes, the monkeys.
monkey.example_zh: 他們吃掉了所有的蛋糕，這些搗蛋鬼。

month.example_en: I'll be away for a month from mid-June to mid-July.

more.example_en: Would you like some more food?

morning.example_zh: 美麗的／陽光明媚的／多雨的上午

mosquito.example_en: Some types of mosquito transmit malaria to humans.
mosquito.example_zh: 某些種類的蚊子能將瘧疾傳染給人類。

most.example_en: What's the most you've ever won at poker?
most.example_zh: 紙牌遊戲中你最多贏過多少？

mother.example_en: My mother was 21 when she got married.

motion.example_en: The violent motion of the ship upset his stomach.
motion.example_zh: 船的劇烈搖晃使他的胃很不舒服。

mountain.example_en: The Matterhorn is one of the biggest mountains in Europe.
mountain.example_zh: 馬特洪峰是歐洲最雄偉的山峰之一。

mouth.example_en: Open your mouth wide and say "Ah".

move.example_en: I'm so cold I can't move my fingers.
move.example_zh: 我太冷了，手指都動不了了。

movement.example_en: He made a sudden movement and frightened the bird away.
movement.example_zh: 他突然動了一下，鳥就受驚飛走了。

movie.example_zh: 我最喜愛的電影是《北非諜影》。

mud.example_en: The vehicles got bogged down in the heavy mud.
mud.example_zh: 車輛深陷淤泥，動彈不得。

mug.example_en: I made myself a large mug of cocoa (= enough to fill a mug) and went to bed.
mug.example_zh: 我為自己沖了一大杯可可茶，然後鑽進了被窩。

music.example_zh: 古典音樂／流行音樂／舞曲／搖滾音樂

musician.example_en: The concert features dancers and musicians of all nationalities.
musician.example_zh: 這場音樂會雲集了各國的舞蹈家和音樂家。

name.example_zh: 「嗨！你叫甚麼名字？｣ 「我叫戴安娜。｣

nation.example_en: All the nations of the world will be represented at the conference.

natural.definition: 天然的，非人為的;非人造的

naughty.definition: （兒童）淘氣的，調皮的，不聽話的
naughty.example_en: Now that's naughty - don't throw food on the floor!
naughty.example_zh: 真淘氣——你不能把食物扔在地上！

near.example_en: Is there a restaurant near here?

nearly.example_en: It's been nearly three months since my last haircut.
nearly.example_zh: 從我上次理髮到現在，已經快三個月了。

necessary.example_en: He lacks the necessary skills for the job.
necessary.example_zh: 他不具備做這項工作所需的技能。

neck.example_en: He had the thickest neck I'd ever seen.
neck.example_zh: 我從沒見過他那麼粗的脖子。

need.example_zh: 嬰兒時刻都需要人照顧。

negative.example_en: We received a negative answer to our request.

neighbor.example_en: Some of the neighbours have complained about the noise from our party.
neighbor.example_zh: 有些鄰居已經抱怨過我們的聚會太喧鬧。

neither.example_en: We've got two TVs, but neither works properly.
neither.example_zh: 我們有兩台電視，但沒有一台是好的。

nervous.example_en: Do you feel/get nervous during exams?

nest.definition: （鳥類或昆蟲的）窩，巢;（某些動物的）穴

never.example_zh: 我們從未去過澳大利亞。

news.example_en: That's the best (piece of) news I've heard for a long time!
news.example_zh: 那是我很長時間以來聽到過最好的消息！

newspaper.example_en: Do you read a newspaper regularly?

next.definition: 下一個的；其次的；緊接著的
next.example_en: Who works in the office next to yours?
next.example_zh: 誰在你隔壁的辦公室工作？

nice.example_en: Did you have a nice trip?

nine.example_en: The children go to bed at nine (o'clock).
nine.example_zh: 小孩們九點鐘上床睡覺。

nineteen.example_en: Simson, aged nineteen, was convicted on two charges of burglary.
nineteen.example_zh: 19歲的西姆森被判兩項盜竊罪罪成。

nod.definition: 點頭；（尤指）點頭贊同，點頭致意，點頭示意
nod.example_en: Many people in the audience nodded in agreement.
nod.example_zh: 許多聽眾點頭表示贊同。

noise.definition: 噪聲;雜音;嘈雜聲;喧鬧聲
noise.example_en: The noise out in the street was deafening.
noise.example_zh: 外面街道上的喧鬧聲震耳欲聾。

none.definition: 沒有一個（人或事物）;全無
none.example_en: None of my children has/have blonde hair.
none.example_zh: 我的孩子們的頭髮都不是金色。
