noon.example_zh: 我們過去經常在中午之前滑雪，然後悠閒地吃午餐。

nor.definition: 也不（通常與 neither 連用）
nor.example_en: We can neither change nor improve it.
nor.example_zh: 對此我們既無法改變，也無法加以改善。

north.example_en: The points of the compass are north, south, east, and west.
north.example_zh: 羅盤上的方位點分別為北、南、東和西。

not.definition: （用於 be，can，have，will，must 等動詞後構成否定表達，在口語中常簡略為n't）不

note.example_en: He left a note to say he would be home late.
note.example_zh: 他留下字條說他會晚點回家。

notebook.example_en: She was jotting things down in a little notebook.
notebook.example_zh: 她在一個小筆記本上匆匆記了些東西。

nothing.example_en: There's nothing in the drawer - I took everything out.
nothing.example_zh: 抽屜裡甚麼也沒有——我把所有東西都拿出去了。

notice.example_en: I noticed a crack in the ceiling.
notice.example_zh: 我注意到天花板上有一道裂縫。

november.example_en: He's starting his new job in November.

now.example_en: She used to be a teacher, but now she works in publishing.
now.example_zh: 她過去曾是一名教師，但現在從事出版工作。

number.example_en: 25, 300, and a billion are all numbers.

nurse.example_en: He worked as a nurse in a psychiatric hospital.

object.definition: （可看見或可觸摸到的）實物，物體
object.example_zh: 固體的／有形的／有形的實物

ocean.example_en: These mysterious creatures live at the bottom of the ocean.
ocean.example_zh: 這些神秘的生物居住在海底。

october.example_en: We have a meeting in October that you are welcome to attend.
october.example_zh: 我們在10月份有個會，歡迎你來參加。

of.definition: （用於表示歸屬或來歷）…的，屬於

off.definition: （尤指離開當前所在地點或位置）離開，遠離
off.example_en: He drove off at the most incredible speed.
off.example_zh: 他以令人難以置信的速度開車走了。

offer.definition: 主動給予;主動提出;提議
offer.example_en: I feel bad that I didn't offer them any food/offer any food to them.
offer.example_zh: 沒有給他們提供任何食物，我覺得很過意不去。

often.example_en: I often see him in the garden.

okay.definition: 可以的，同意的；能接受的，可行的
okay.example_en: "I'll pay you back tomorrow." "OK, no problem."

omit.example_en: She was omitted from the list of contributors to the report.
omit.example_zh: 這篇報道的撰稿人中漏掉了她的名字。

on.example_en: Look at all the books on your desk!
on.example_zh: 看看你書桌上這麼多書！

once.example_en: I went sailing once, but I didn't like it.
once.example_zh: 我玩過一次帆船，不過我不喜歡。

one.example_en: He had two slices and I only had one.
one.example_zh: 他有兩片，而我只有一片。

onion.example_en: I always cry when I'm chopping onions.
onion.example_zh: 我切洋蔥的時候，總是被嗆得流眼淚。

only.example_en: I was the only person on the train.
only.example_zh: 我是火車上唯一的乘客。

operate.definition: （使）工作，（使）運行;運作;操作;起作用
operate.example_en: How do you operate the remote control unit?
operate.example_zh: 你是怎麼操作這個遙控器的？

opinion.example_en: What's your opinion about/on the matter?
opinion.example_zh: 你對這件事有甚麼看法？

or.definition: （用於連接不同的可能性）或，或者；還是，亦或
or.example_en: Is it Tuesday or Wednesday today?
or.example_zh: 今天是星期二還是星期三？

order.example_en: "Can I take your order now?" said the waiter.
order.example_zh: 侍者問：「現在可以點菜了嗎？」

ordinary.definition: 普通的，平常的；平凡的；一般的

other.example_en: The product has many other time-saving features.
other.example_zh: 該產品還有許多其他的省時特性。

out.example_en: She opened the window and stuck her head out.
out.example_zh: 她打開窗戶，將頭探了出去。

outside.definition: 在外面（的），在室外（的）;在…外面（的）
outside.example_en: It was a sunny day outside.

oven.example_zh: 普通／燃氣／鼓風助力烤箱

over.example_en: The sign over the door said "Exit".
over.example_zh: 門上方的牌子上寫著「出口」。

overseas.definition: 在海外（的）;從國外來（的）;到國外（的）
overseas.example_en: We need to open up overseas markets.
overseas.example_zh: 我們需要開拓海外市場。

own.example_en: Each neighbourhood in New York has its own characteristics.
own.example_zh: 紐約的每個居民區都有自己的特點。

owner.example_en: Are you the owner of this car?

pack.example_en: We're leaving early tomorrow morning, so you'd better pack (= put clothes and other possessions into suitcases or bags) tonight.
pack.example_zh: 我們明天一大早就要出發，所以你最好今晚就收拾行李。

package.example_en: The courier has just delivered a package for you.
package.example_zh: 送遞急件的信差剛剛送來一個包裹給你。

page.example_en: For details on how to enter the competition, see page 134.
page.example_zh: 關於如何參加比賽的細則，請參見第134頁。

pain.example_en: Her symptoms included abdominal pain and vomiting.
pain.example_zh: 她的症狀包括腹痛和嘔吐。

painful.definition: 令人痛苦的，引起痛苦的
painful.example_en: The old photograph brought back painful memories.
painful.example_zh: 這張老照片喚起了痛苦的回憶。

pale.example_en: You're looking pale - are you feeling well?
pale.example_zh: 你看起來臉色蒼白——你病了嗎？

pan.example_en: Heat the milk in a small pan.
pan.example_zh: 用小平底鍋把牛奶煮熱。

pardon.definition: 原諒，寬恕（常用於禮貌的表達方式）
pardon.example_en: Pardon my ignorance, but what exactly is ergonomics?
pardon.example_zh: 請恕我無知，不過人體工程學究竟是甚麼一回事？

parent.example_en: I'm going to meet Richard's parents for the first time this weekend.
parent.example_zh: 我這個週末將第一次見理查的父母。

part.example_en: Part of my steak isn't cooked properly.
part.example_zh: 我這塊牛排有些部分沒做好。

particular.example_en: She wanted a particular type of cactus.
particular.example_zh: 她要某一特定品種的仙人掌。

partner.example_en: He gave up his job as a police officer after his partner was killed.
partner.example_zh: 他在搭檔被殺後辭去了警官的工作。

pass.example_en: I passed him on the stairs this morning.
pass.example_zh: 今天早上我在樓梯上與他擦肩而過。

past.example_en: I live on Station Road, just past the post office.
past.example_zh: 我住在車站路，就在郵局過去一點。

patient.example_en: I'm a patient of Dr Stephens; please could I make an appointment to see her?
patient.example_zh: 我是史蒂芬斯醫生的病人，請問我能不能預約一下看病時間？

pattern.example_en: The pattern of family life has been changing over recent years.
pattern.example_zh: 近年來家庭生活的模式一直在變化。

pause.example_en: There will be a brief pause in the proceedings while the piano is moved into place.
pause.example_zh: 在將鋼琴搬過去放好之前，活動將暫停一會兒。

pay.example_en: How much did you pay for the tickets?
pay.example_zh: 你買那些票花了多少錢？

peach.example_en: Would you like peaches and cream for dessert?
peach.example_zh: 你想來點蜜桃霜淇淋當甜點嗎？

people.example_en: Many people never do any exercise.
people.example_zh: 許多人從來不做任何運動。

perhaps.example_en: He hasn't written to me recently - perhaps he's lost my address.
perhaps.example_zh: 他最近沒寫信給我——也許他把我的地址弄丟了。

period.example_en: Her work means that she spends long periods away from home.
period.example_zh: 她的工作意味著她須長時間離家在外。

personal.example_en: My personal opinion/view is that the students should be doing more work outside the classroom.
personal.example_zh: 我個人認為學生應該多做一些課外作業。

pet.example_en: They have several pets - a dog, two rabbits, and a guinea pig.
pet.example_zh: 他們有好幾隻寵物：一隻狗、兩隻兔子和一隻天竺鼠。

photo.example_en: She took lots of photos of the kids.
photo.example_zh: 她拍了很多孩子的照片。

piano.example_zh: 我們準備買一架新鋼琴。

pick.example_en: Pick a card from the pack.
pick.example_zh: 從這副紙牌中挑出一張。

picnic.example_en: If the weather's nice we could have a picnic in the park.
picnic.example_zh: 天氣好的話我們就能去公園野餐。

picture.example_en: Freddy drew/painted a picture of my dog.
picture.example_zh: 弗雷迪畫了一幅我的狗的畫像。

pie.example_en: Would you like some more steak pie?

piece.example_en: a piece of cloth torn from her coat
piece.example_zh: 從她大衣上撕下的一塊布

pig.definition: 令人討厭的人，難相處的人
pig.example_en: The meat produced from a pig is called pork, bacon, or ham.
pig.example_zh: 豬提供的肉類食品包括鮮豬肉、熏鹹肉和火腿。

pillow.example_en: Do you prefer a feather pillow or a foam pillow?
pillow.example_zh: 你喜歡羽絨枕頭還是海綿枕頭？

pin.definition: （尤指用於固定布料用的）別針，大頭針
pin.example_en: I'll keep the trouser patch in place with pins while I sew it on.
pin.example_zh: 在把褲子的補丁縫上去時，我會用別針把它固定好。

pipe.example_zh: 供水管道／煤氣管道／污水管

place.example_en: Her garden was a cool pleasant place to sit.
place.example_zh: 坐在她的花園裡真是涼爽宜人。

plain.definition: 樸素的；不加修飾的；簡單的
plain.example_en: She wore a plain black dress.
plain.example_zh: 她穿著一件樸素的黑色連身裙。

platform.example_en: The next train for Aberdeen will depart from platform 9.
platform.example_zh: 下一趟去亞伯丁的火車將從9號月臺開出。

play.example_en: The children spent the afternoon playing with their new toys.
play.example_zh: 孩子們下午在玩自己的新玩具。

playground.example_en: This area of the coast is the playground of the rich and famous.
playground.example_zh: 海濱的這片區域是富人和名人們的娛樂場。

pleasant.definition: 令人愉快的;宜人的;親切友好的
pleasant.example_zh: 宜人的氣候／親切的笑容／和氣可愛的人

please.definition: 好嗎，請（用於客氣地請求）
please.example_en: Could I have two coffees and a tea, please?
please.example_zh: 給我來兩杯咖啡、一杯茶好嗎？

point.example_en: I'd like to discuss the first point in your essay.
point.example_zh: 我想討論一下你文章中的第一點。

poison.example_en: The pest control officer put bowls of rat poison in the attic.
poison.example_zh: 蟲害防治官員在閣樓裡放了幾碗老鼠藥。

police.example_en: I think you should call the police.

polite.example_en: I'm afraid I wasn't very polite to her.
polite.example_zh: 恐怕那時我對她有點不禮貌。

pollute.example_en: The pesticides used on many farms are polluting the water supply.
pollute.example_zh: 許多農場裡使用的殺蟲劑正在污染供水。

pool.example_en: We looked for crabs in the rock pools along the seashore.
pool.example_zh: 我們在海邊岩石的水坑裡找螃蟹。

poor.example_en: Most of the world's poorest countries are in Africa.
poor.example_zh: 世界上最窮的國家多數在非洲。

popular.definition: 受大眾喜愛的，受歡迎的
popular.example_en: She's the most popular teacher in school.
popular.example_zh: 她是學校裡最受歡迎的老師。

population.example_en: Ten percent of the population lived in poverty.

pose.definition: 造成，引起（尤指問題或困難）
pose.example_en: Nuclear weapons pose a threat to everyone.
pose.example_zh: 核子武器對所有人都構成了威脅。

position.example_en: Well, I've found our position on the map if you want to see where we are.
position.example_zh: 好啦，如果你想知道我們現在所在位置的話，我已經在地圖上找到了。

positive.definition: 建設性的;積極的;懷有希望的

possible.example_en: I can't get it all done by Friday - it's just not possible.
possible.example_zh: 我星期五前無法全部完成——是不可能的。

post.example_en: I'd been away for a few days so I had a lot of post waiting for me.
post.example_zh: 我離開了幾天，所以有好多信件等著我處理。

pot.example_en: Fill a large pot with salted water and bring it to the boil.
pot.example_zh: 用一個大壺裝滿鹽水並煮開。

pound.definition: 鎊（英國等國家的貨幣單位）

power.example_en: I've no power over him - he does what he wants to.
power.example_zh: 我管不了他——他想做甚麼就做甚麼。

practice.example_en: How do you intend to put these proposals into practice, Mohamed?
practice.example_zh: 穆罕默德，你打算如何把這些計劃付諸實行？

praise.example_en: He should be praised for his honesty.
praise.example_zh: 他應該因為誠實而獲得表揚。

prefer.definition: 寧可，更喜愛;覺得還是…更可取
prefer.example_en: Do you prefer hot or cold weather?

prepare.definition: 準備，預備;把…準備好，使預備好
prepare.example_en: Have you prepared for your interview?
prepare.example_zh: 你作好面試的準備了嗎？

presence.definition: 出席，在場;（事物的）存在，出現
presence.example_en: She was overawed by the presence of so many people.
presence.example_zh: 這麼多人在場，把她嚇壞了。

present.definition: （尤指表示友誼或致謝的）禮物，贈品

pressure.example_en: He put too much pressure on the door handle and it snapped.
pressure.example_zh: 他用力過猛，把門的把手弄斷了。

pretty.example_en: The house has four bedrooms, so it's pretty big.
pretty.example_zh: 這棟房子有四間臥房，因此非常大。

price.example_en: The price of oil has risen sharply.

pride.example_en: She felt a great sense of pride as she watched him accept the award.
pride.example_zh: 看著他接過那個獎，她感到非常自豪。

priest.definition: 神父，牧師，司鐸;（基督教以外的）神職人員
priest.example_en: Father O'Dooley was ordained a priest in 1949.
priest.example_zh: 奧杜利神父是1949年被授予神父職位的。

primary.example_en: The Red Cross's primary concern is to preserve and protect human life.
primary.example_zh: 紅十字會最關心的是維護人的生命安全。

princess.example_en: Lady Diana Spencer became Princess Diana when she married Prince Charles.
princess.example_zh: 戴安娜•斯賓塞女士在與查理斯王子結婚後成為戴安娜王妃。

principal.example_zh: 伊拉克最重要的出口商品是石油。

print.example_en: The title is in bold print.

prison.example_en: Conditions in the prison are said to be appalling.
prison.example_zh: 聽說監獄裡的條件糟透了。

private.example_en: She has a small office that is used for private discussions.
private.example_zh: 她有一間小辦公室，做密談之用。

prize.example_en: The critics' prize for best film was won by Marc Abbott for "Belly Laugh".
prize.example_zh: 馬克•阿博特的《捧腹大笑》被評論家們評為最佳影片。

probably.example_en: I'll probably be home by midnight.

problem.definition: （須解決的）問題；疑難問題，困難

produce.example_en: France produces a great deal of wine for export.
produce.example_zh: 法國生產大量葡萄酒供出口。

production.example_en: Coke is used in the production of steel.

progress.example_en: Technological progress has been so rapid over the last few years.
progress.example_zh: 在最近幾年中，科技進步如此迅猛。

project.example_zh: 國王十字路口的住宅專案

promise.example_en: He promised faithfully to call me every week.
promise.example_zh: 他信誓旦旦地保證每週都打電話給我。

pronounce.example_en: How do you pronounce your surname?

protect.example_en: clothing that protects you against the cold

proud.example_en: You must be very proud of your son.
proud.example_zh: 你一定為你的兒子感到非常自豪。

prove.example_en: The operation proved a complete success.
prove.example_zh: 這場手術結果是大成功。

provide.example_en: This booklet provides useful information about local services.
provide.example_zh: 這本小冊子提供了有關當地服務機構的有用資訊。

public.example_en: Public opinion (= the opinions of most people) has turned against him.

pull.example_en: Could you help me move this bookcase over there? You pull and I'll push.
pull.example_zh: 你能幫我把這個書櫃移到那邊去嗎？你拉我推。

pump.definition: 唧筒，幫浦，抽水機;油泵;打氣筒
pump.example_zh: 水泵／自行車打氣筒／油泵

punish.example_en: Those responsible for these crimes must be brought to court and punished.
punish.example_zh: 那些該為罪行負責的人必須被送上法庭接受懲罰。

puppy.example_en: Our dog has just had four puppies.
puppy.example_zh: 我們的狗剛剛生了四隻小狗。

purpose.example_en: The purpose of the research is to try to find out more about the causes of the disease.
purpose.example_zh: 研究的目的是試圖進一步探尋引起這種疾病的原因。

push.example_en: Can you help me move this table? You push and I'll pull.
push.example_zh: 你能幫我挪一下這張桌子嗎？你推我拉。

put.example_en: Where have you put the keys?

puzzle.definition: 令人費解的情況;難題;謎
puzzle.example_en: Scientists have been trying to solve this puzzle for years.
puzzle.example_zh: 多年來科學家們一直試圖解開這個謎。

quality.example_en: a shop advertising top quality electrical goods
quality.example_zh: 以高品質電器為口號的商店

quantity.definition: （尤指可測量或確定的）量，數量，分量
quantity.example_en: Police found a large/small quantity of drugs in his possession.
quantity.example_zh: 警方發現他攜帶大/少量的毒品。

quarter.example_en: He cut the orange into quarters.

queen.example_en: How long did Queen Victoria reign?
queen.example_zh: 維多利亞女王在位多長時間？

question.example_en: The police asked me questions all day.

quiet.example_en: She spoke in a quiet voice so as not to wake him.
quiet.example_zh: 她輕聲說話，以免吵醒他。

quit.example_en: Would you quit your job if you inherited lots of money?
quit.example_zh: 假如繼承了一大筆錢，你會辭掉工作嗎？

quite.example_en: The two situations are quite different.

quiz.example_zh: 歷史/體育知識等問答競賽

race.example_en: Do you know who won/lost the race?
race.example_zh: 你知道比賽誰贏／輸了嗎？

railroad.example_en: We live close to the railroad line.

rainbow.example_en: The sun came out and we saw a rainbow.
rainbow.example_zh: 太陽出來了，我們看到了一道彩虹。

rainy.example_en: We had three rainy days on holiday, but otherwise it was sunny.
rainy.example_zh: 我們度假時遇到三個雨天，不過其他的日子都是陽光明媚。

raise.example_en: Would all those in favour please raise their hands?

range.example_en: I offered her a range of options.

rare.definition: 稀少的；罕見的；不常發生的

rather.example_en: It's rather cold today, isn't it?

reach.definition: （尤指經過很長時間或費很大氣力旅行後）到達，抵達
reach.example_en: We won't reach Miami until five or six o'clock.
reach.example_zh: 我們得五六點鐘才能到達邁阿密。

read.example_en: He spent a pleasant afternoon reading (the newspaper/a book).
read.example_zh: 他一下午都在閱讀（報紙／書），過得很開心。

ready.definition: 準備好的，有準備的；現成的；方便使用的

real.definition: 實際存在的，現實的；真實的
real.example_en: Assuring the patient that she has a real and not imaginary problem is the first step.
real.example_zh: 使病人確信她真的患病，並非杯弓蛇影，這是對她進行治療的第一步。

realize.example_en: They didn't realize the danger they were in.
realize.example_zh: 他們沒有意識到自己身處危險之中。

really.example_en: He isn't really angry - he's just pretending.
really.example_zh: 他不是真生氣——他只是假裝的。

reason.example_en: The reason for the disaster was engine failure, not human error.
reason.example_zh: 這次災難的原因是引擎故障，而非人為錯誤。

record.example_en: Cliff Richard has recorded more number one hit songs than any other British pop star.
record.example_zh: 在英國流行樂歌星中，克利夫．理查錄製的歌曲榮登排行榜榜首的數量最多。

recover.definition: （在疾病或受傷之後）完全恢復健康
recover.example_en: It took her a long time to recover from/after her heart operation.
recover.example_zh: 她心臟動手術後很長時間身體才復原。

recycle.definition: 分揀收集（垃圾）用於回收再用
recycle.example_en: The Japanese recycle more than half their waste paper.
recycle.example_zh: 日本人將一半以上的廢紙回收利用。

refrigerator.example_en: Store fruit juice in the refrigerator.
refrigerator.example_zh: 把水果汁儲存在冰箱裡。

refuse.example_en: He asked me to give him another loan, but I refused.
refuse.example_zh: 他讓我再借給他一筆錢，我拒絕了。

regard.example_en: Environmentalists regard GM technology with suspicion.
regard.example_zh: 環境論者對基因改造技術持懷疑態度。

regret.example_en: I left school at 16, but I've had a great life and I have no regrets.
regret.example_zh: 我16歲就輟學了，但是我的人生很成功，我沒有甚麽可遺憾的。

regular.definition: 頻繁的;經常發生的;經常做的
regular.example_zh: 老顧客／經常去教堂做禮拜的人／固定讀者／老用戶

reject.definition: 拒絕接受;拒收;不錄用;不相信
reject.example_en: The appeal was rejected by the court.

relation.example_en: Relations between him and his new wife are rather strained.
relation.example_zh: 他和新娶的妻子之間的關係很緊張。

relative.example_en: I don't have many blood relatives (= people related to me by birth rather than by marriage).
relative.example_zh: 我沒有幾個有血緣關係的親戚。

remember.definition: 記得，記起，回想起;記住，牢記
remember.example_en: "Where did you park the car?" "I can't remember."
remember.example_zh: 「你把車停在哪裡了？」「我不記得了。」

remind.example_en: Could you remind Paul about dinner on Saturday?
remind.example_zh: 你能否提醒一下保羅週六晚宴的事？

rent.example_en: I pay a higher rent/more rent than the other tenants because my room is bigger.
rent.example_zh: 我的房租比其他房客高，因為我的房間要大些。

repair.example_en: to repair (the surface of) the road

repeat.example_en: Would you mind repeating what you just said?
repeat.example_zh: 您能重複一遍剛才您講的話嗎？

reply.example_en: "Where are you going?" I asked. "Home," he replied.

report.example_en: We called the insurance company to report the theft.
report.example_zh: 我們打電話將失竊的事情告知保險公司。

require.example_en: Please call this number if you require any further information.
require.example_zh: 如需更多資訊請撥此電話號碼垂詢。

respect.example_en: I have great/the greatest respect for his ideas, although I don't agree with them.
respect.example_zh: 我非常尊重他的想法，不過我並不贊同這些想法。

responsible.example_en: Paul is directly responsible for the efficient running of the office.
responsible.example_zh: 保羅直接負責辦事處的高效運作。

rest.example_en: The doctor told him that he should rest for a few days.
rest.example_zh: 醫生告訴他應該休息幾天。

restaurant.example_en: We went to a little Italian restaurant and shared a pizza.

restroom.definition: （公共場所的）盥洗室，洗手間，公共廁所

result.example_en: The road has been widened, but the result is just more traffic.
result.example_zh: 道路被拓寬，但結果車流量卻更大了。

return.example_en: Odysseus returned home/returned to his home after many years of travelling.
return.example_zh: 離家多年後奧德修斯返回了故土。

review.example_en: The committee is reviewing the current arrangement/situation.
review.example_zh: 委員會正在審查目前的安排／研究當前的形勢。

revise.example_en: His helpfulness today has made me revise my original opinion/impression of him.
revise.example_zh: 他今天所表現出的樂於助人的品質使我改變了對他的最初看法／印象。

rich.example_en: He's the third richest man in the country.

ride.example_en: I learned to ride a bike when I was six.
ride.example_zh: 我六歲學會了騎腳踏車。

right.example_en: You got three answers right and two wrong.
right.example_zh: 你答對了三道題，錯了兩道。

ring.definition: 環（狀物）;圓形的東西;環形排列
ring.example_en: The game involved throwing metal rings over a stick.
ring.example_zh: 這個遊戲的玩法是扔金屬環套在一根棍子上。

rise.example_en: The balloon rose gently (up) into the air.

river.example_en: We sailed slowly down the river.
river.example_zh: 我們順流而下緩緩航行。

road.example_en: We live on a busy/quiet road.
road.example_zh: 我們住在一條繁忙／僻靜的公路邊。

rob.example_en: The terrorists financed themselves by robbing banks.
rob.example_zh: 恐怖分子靠搶銀行來獲得資金。

robot.example_en: The surgery can be carried out by robots.
robot.example_zh: 手術可以由機器人來做。

rock.example_en: Mountains and cliffs are formed from rock.
rock.example_zh: 山和懸崖都是由岩石構成的。

role.example_en: What is his role in this project?
role.example_zh: 他在這個工程中負責甚麽？

roll.example_en: The vase rolled off the edge of the table and smashed.
roll.example_zh: 花瓶從桌邊滾落下來摔得粉碎。

roof.example_en: The house has a sloping/flat/tiled/thatched roof.
roof.example_zh: 這間房子是斜頂／平頂／石板瓦頂／茅草（等）的。

room.example_en: I like this room - it has plenty of light.
room.example_zh: 我喜歡這個房間——光線非常充足。

root.example_en: We must get to the root of (= discover the cause of) this problem.
root.example_zh: 我們一定要探本溯源，查出造成這個問題的原因。

rope.example_en: A sailor threw a rope ashore and we tied the boat to a post.
rope.example_zh: 一個水手將一條纜繩扔到岸上，於是我們把船拴到了一根柱子上。

round.example_en: The moon goes round the earth.

row.example_zh: 一排房屋／一排書／一行植物／一隊人／一隊馬

rub.example_en: She yawned and rubbed her eyes sleepily.
rub.example_zh: 她打著哈欠睡意朦朧地揉著眼睛。

rubber.example_en: Tyres are almost always made of rubber.
rubber.example_zh: 幾乎所有輪胎都是用橡膠製成的。

rude.definition: 不禮貌的;粗魯的，粗野的;討厭的

ruin.example_en: Huge modern hotels have ruined this once unspoilt coastline.
ruin.example_zh: 龐然大物般的現代旅館已經完全毀掉了這片曾經如世外桃源般的海岸。

rule.example_en: A referee must know all the rules of the game.
rule.example_zh: 裁判一定要通曉比賽的所有規則。

ruler.example_en: The country was without a ruler after the queen died.
ruler.example_zh: 女王死後，這個國家陷入了無人統治的狀態。

run.example_en: The children had to run to keep up with their father.
run.example_zh: 孩子們得一路跑著才能跟上他們的父親。

rush.definition: （使）急速行進;（使）趕緊;（使）倉促行事;（使）急速做
rush.example_en: I've been rushing (about/around) all day trying to get everything done.
rush.example_zh: 我忙了整整一天，想把所有的事情都做完。

sad.definition: 傷心的，悲哀的;令人難過的，令人遺憾的
sad.example_en: I've just received some very sad news.
sad.example_zh: 我剛剛得到一些令人傷心的消息。

safe.example_en: In some cities you don't feel safe going out alone at night.
safe.example_zh: 在某些城市，夜晚獨自外出會覺得不安全。

safety.example_en: For your (comfort and) safety, we recommend you keep your seat belt loosely fastened during the flight.
safety.example_zh: 爲了您的（舒適和）安全，我們建議您在飛行期間鬆鬆地繫住安全帶。

sail.example_en: The boat sailed along/down the coast.

sailor.example_en: I wasn't a good sailor at the best of times and the sea was very choppy that day.

salad.definition: （通常用生菜等做成的）蔬菜沙拉
salad.example_en: Toss (= mix) the salad with a vinaigrette dressing.
salad.example_zh: 用油醋醬調味料拌沙拉。

sale.example_en: The sale of cigarettes/alcohol is forbidden.

same.example_en: My twin sister and I have the same nose.
same.example_zh: 我孿生姐姐的鼻子和我的長得一樣。

satisfy.example_en: They have 31 flavours of ice cream - enough to satisfy everyone!
satisfy.example_zh: 他們有31種口味的霜淇淋——足以滿足所有人！

save.example_en: Wearing seat belts has saved many lives.
save.example_zh: 繫安全帶挽救了許多人的生命。

say.example_en: Small children find it difficult to say long words.
say.example_zh: 小孩子覺得長字不好說。

scare.definition: （使）驚恐，（使）害怕;受驚嚇，感到害怕
scare.example_zh: 突然的響聲把她嚇了一跳。

scenery.example_zh: 美麗的／懾魂的／壯觀的景色

science.definition: 科學;自然科學;科學知識

scooter.example_en: Her favourite toy is a little red scooter.

score.example_en: Tennant scored in the last minute of the game.

screen.example_zh: 我們的電視螢幕是19吋的。

seafood.definition: 海產，海鮮（尤指魚或貝類）

search.example_en: The police searched the woods for the missing boy.
search.example_zh: 員警在樹林中搜尋失蹤的男孩。

season.example_en: How long does the dry/hurricane/monsoon season last?
season.example_zh: 旱／颶風／季風季要持續多久？

seat.example_en: Chairs, sofas and benches are different types of seat.
seat.example_zh: 椅子、沙發和長凳是不同類型的座椅。

second.example_en: Is Carla her first or second child?
second.example_zh: 卡拉是她的第一個還是第二個孩子？

secret.example_en: Why did you have to go and tell Bob about my illness? You just can't keep a secret, can you?
secret.example_zh: 你爲甚麽一定要跑去把我生病的事告訴鮑勃？你就是不能保守秘密，是嗎？

secretary.example_en: My secretary will phone you to arrange a meeting.
secretary.example_zh: 我的秘書會打電話給你安排會議。

section.example_en: the sports section of the newspaper

see.example_en: Turn the light on so I can see.
see.example_zh: 打開燈，這樣我才看得到。

seed.example_en: Sow the seeds (= put them in the ground) about three centimetres deep.
seed.example_zh: 把這些種子種進約三公分深的地方。

seek.definition: 尋找；尋求（尤指非物質的東西）
seek.example_en: "Are you actively seeking jobs?" she asked.

seem.example_en: He's 16, but he often seems (to be) younger.
seem.example_zh: 他16歲了，但往往看起來小一點。

seldom.example_en: Now that we have a baby, we seldom get the chance to go to the cinema.
seldom.example_zh: 有了孩子以後，我們很少有機會看電影。

select.example_en: There was a choice of four prizes, and the winner could select one of them.
select.example_zh: 有四種獎品可供選擇，獲勝者可以從中挑選一個。

self.example_en: The hero of the movie finally finds his true self (= discovers what his true personality and feelings are).
self.example_zh: 電影的主角最後找到了真正的自我。

selfish.example_en: The judge told him: "Your attitude shows a selfish disregard for others."
selfish.example_zh: 法官告訴他：「你的態度表明你只顧自己而不顧他人。」

sell.example_en: I sold him my car/I sold my car to him for $600.
sell.example_zh: 我把車以600美元的價錢賣給了他。

semester.definition: （尤指美國和澳大利亞大學的）學期

send.example_en: I'll send her a letter/email/parcel/postcard next week.
send.example_zh: 我下週要給她寄信／電子郵件／包裹／明信片。

sense.definition: 官能;感覺;知覺（尤指視覺、聽覺、嗅覺、味覺和觸覺）
sense.example_en: With her excellent sense of smell, she could tell if you were a smoker from the other side of the room.
sense.example_zh: 她嗅覺靈敏，在房間的另一端就能知道你是否抽煙。

sentence.example_en: He's very impatient and always interrupts me mid-sentence.
sentence.example_zh: 他很不耐煩，總是在我說到一半的時候就打斷我。

september.example_en: My mother's birthday is in September.

servant.example_zh: 公務員應該做到清正廉潔。

serve.example_en: Do they serve meals in the bar?

service.definition: 公共服務系統；公共事業

set.definition: 放，置;使處於（指定的地方、位置）
set.example_en: He set a vase of flowers on the table.
set.example_zh: 他把一瓶花放在桌子上。

settle.definition: 確定;決定;解決，結束（爭端等）
settle.example_en: Good, that's all settled - you send out the invitations for the party, and I'll organize the food.
settle.example_zh: 好，那就這麽決定了——你發送派對的請帖，我來準備吃的。

seven.example_en: The restaurant opens for dinner at seven (o'clock).
seven.example_zh: 餐廳在七點鐘開門供應晚餐。

seventeen.example_en: I'm nearly seventeen so I should be able to do what I want.
seventeen.example_zh: 我快17歲了，所以可以做我想做的事了。

several.example_en: I've seen "Gone with the Wind" several times.
several.example_zh: 我已經看過好幾遍《亂世佳人》了。

shake.example_en: A young boy climbed into the apple tree and shook the branches so that the fruit fell down.
shake.example_zh: 一個男孩爬上蘋果樹，用力搖著樹枝好讓蘋果掉下來。

shall.definition: （用於在主語爲 I 或 we 時替代 will）
shall.example_en: If you do that one more time, I shall be very angry.
shall.example_zh: 如果你再那麽做，我就要生氣了。

shape.example_en: Clay can be moulded into almost any shape.
shape.example_zh: 黏土可以塑成幾乎任何形狀。

share.example_en: She's very possessive about her toys and finds it hard to share.
share.example_zh: 她對自己的玩具佔有欲太強，很難跟別人分享。

sharp.example_en: a knife with a sharp edge/blade.

sheep.example_en: The farmer has a large flock (= group) of long-haired sheep.

sheet.example_en: I've put clean sheets on the bed.
sheet.example_zh: 我已經給床鋪上了乾淨的床單。

shelf.definition: （通常指固定在牆上或櫥櫃中的）架子

shell.example_en: Brazil nuts have very hard shells.

shine.example_en: Is that light shining in your eyes?

shock.definition: 令人震驚的事件（或經歷）；驚愕，震驚
shock.example_en: Her mother's death came as a great shock - it was so unexpected.
shock.example_zh: 她母親的去世讓人倍感震驚——簡直太出乎意料了。

shoot.definition: 開（槍），射（箭）;發射;射中，射傷，射殺
shoot.example_en: If he's not armed, don't shoot.
shoot.example_zh: 如果他沒帶武器，就不要開槍。

shore.example_en: You can walk for miles along the shore.
shore.example_zh: 你可以沿著海岸走上好幾英里。

shorts.definition: （常在熱天或運動時穿的）短褲

should.example_en: If you're annoyed with him, you should tell him.
should.example_zh: 如果你生他的氣，就應該告訴他。

shoulder.example_en: I rested my head on her shoulder.

shout.example_en: There's no need to shout, I can hear you.
shout.example_zh: 沒有必要大聲喊叫，我完全聽得見。

show.example_en: Let me show you this new book I've just bought.
show.example_zh: 給你看看我剛買的這本新書。

shower.example_en: The shower is broken - you'll have to have a bath.
shower.example_zh: 淋浴器壞了——你得用浴缸洗澡了。

shy.example_en: He was too shy to ask her to dance with him.
shy.example_zh: 他太害羞了，不敢邀請她跳舞。

sick.definition: 生病的，患病的，不舒服的

side.example_en: The names of ships are usually painted on their sides.
side.example_zh: 船的名字通常漆在船的側面。

sidewalk.example_en: Keep on the sidewalk, Rosie, there's a good girl.
sidewalk.example_zh: 沿著人行道走，羅茜，乖孩子。

sight.example_en: If your sight is poor, you should not drive a car.
sight.example_zh: 視力不佳就不應該開車。

sign.example_zh: 在信件／支票／合約／租約／協定上簽名

silence.example_en: A loud crash of thunder broke the silence of the night.
silence.example_zh: 一聲響雷打破了夜晚的寧靜。

silent.example_en: The empty house was completely silent.

silly.example_en: Don't do that, you silly boy!
silly.example_zh: 不要那麽做，你這個傻小子！

silver.example_en: We gave them a dish made of solid silver as a wedding present.
silver.example_zh: 我們送給愛麗森和湯姆一個純銀盤子作爲結婚禮物。

similar.example_en: My father and I have similar views on politics.
similar.example_zh: 我和父親在政治上觀點相似。

simple.example_en: The instructions were written in simple English.
simple.example_zh: 這些說明書是用簡單易懂的英文寫成的。

simply.example_en: You look simply (= really) beautiful in that dress.
simply.example_zh: 你穿那條裙子看起來真漂亮。

since.example_en: Emma went to work in New York a year ago, and we haven't seen her since.
since.example_zh: 埃瑪一年前去紐約工作了，自從那時起我們就沒有見過她。

sincere.definition: （人、感情或行爲）真誠的，誠實的

sing.example_en: The children sang two songs by Schubert at the school concert.
sing.example_zh: 在學校音樂會上，孩子們演唱了舒伯特的兩首歌曲。

singer.example_en: Bryn Terfel is a famous singer from Wales.
singer.example_zh: 布萊恩·特費爾是威爾士著名歌手。

single.example_en: He knocked his opponent down with a single blow.
single.example_zh: 他僅用一拳就打倒了對手。

sink.example_en: The Titanic was a passenger ship which sank (to the bottom of the ocean) in 1912.
sink.example_zh: 鐵達尼號是1912年沈沒（海底）的一艘客輪。

sir.example_en: Would you like to see the menu, sir?

sitter.definition: 擺姿勢讓人畫像的模特兒，被畫像者
sitter.example_en: In the 90th minute, Fox missed a sitter.
sitter.example_zh: 比賽進行到90分鐘，福克斯錯失了一個必進球。

six.example_en: Look for a bus with a number six on the front.
six.example_zh: 找一輛前面有數字六的公車。

sixteen.example_en: We have got sixteen (people) coming for lunch.

size.example_en: We are concerned about the size of our debt.
size.example_zh: 我們爲自己的巨額債務感到憂心。

skin.example_zh: 暗黑／白皙／蒼白／棕褐色的皮膚

skinny.example_en: You should eat more - you're too skinny.
skinny.example_zh: 你應該多吃點，你太瘦了。

skirt.example_en: She wore a denim skirt and a white shirt.
skirt.example_zh: 她穿著一條牛仔半身裙和一件白襯衫。

sleep.example_en: I must get some sleep - I'm exhausted.
sleep.example_zh: 我必須睡一會兒——我太累了。

sleepy.example_en: They retired to a sleepy little town in the south of Italy.
sleepy.example_zh: 他們隱居到意大利南部一個寂靜的小村莊裡。

slender.example_en: He put his hands around her slender waist.
slender.example_zh: 他雙手摟住了她纖細的腰。

slide.example_en: When I was little I used to like sliding on the polished floor in my socks.
slide.example_zh: 小時候我喜歡穿著短襪在光亮的地板上滑行。

slim.example_zh: 窄窄的臀部／纖細的雙腿

slow.example_zh: 跑步慢的人／開車慢的人／看書慢的人

smart.example_en: Guy looks very smart in his new suit, doesn't he?
smart.example_zh: 蓋伊穿上新西裝顯得精神十足，不是嗎？

smile.example_en: Amy had a big/broad smile on her face.

snack.example_en: I had a huge lunch, so I'll only need a snack for dinner.
snack.example_zh: 我午餐吃得很飽，所以晚餐吃些點心就可以了。

snake.example_en: He's terrified of being bitten by a snake.

snow.example_en: Outside the snow began to fall.

snowy.example_en: We've had a very snowy winter this year.
snowy.example_zh: 今年我們過了一個多雪的冬天。

social.example_en: I had an active social life when I was at college.
social.example_zh: 念大學時，我的社交生活很豐富。

society.example_zh: 無階級／多元文化／資本主義／文明的社會

some.example_en: There's some cake in the kitchen if you'd like it.
some.example_zh: 想吃蛋糕的話，廚房有一些。

something.example_en: There's something sharp in my shoe.

sometimes.example_en: Sometimes we take food with us and sometimes we buy food when we're there.
sometimes.example_zh: 有時我們自己帶食物，有時我們在那裡買。

somewhere.example_en: He was last heard of living somewhere on the south coast of France.
somewhere.example_zh: 最後一次聽到關於他的消息時，說他住在法國南海岸的某地。

soon.example_en: She'll soon be here./She'll be here soon.

sore.example_en: All the dust has made my eyes sore.

sorry.example_en: I'm just sorry about all the trouble I've caused her.
sorry.example_zh: 我爲給她帶來的所有麻煩而感到抱歉。

soul.example_en: She suffered greatly while she was alive, so let us hope her soul is now at peace.
soul.example_zh: 她生前受過很多苦，所以我們希望現在她的靈魂能得到安息。

sound.example_en: They could hear the sound of a bell tolling in the distance.
sound.example_zh: 他們能聽到遠處的鐘聲。

sour.example_en: These plums are a bit sour.

source.definition: 來源，出處;發源地;起源，根源

south.example_en: The points of the compass are north, south, east, and west.
south.example_zh: 指南針上的四個方位分別是北、南、東、西。

space.example_en: Is there any space for my clothes in that cupboard?
space.example_zh: 那個衣櫥還放得下我的衣服嗎？

speak.example_en: Would you mind speaking more slowly, please?

special.definition: 特殊的，特別的；不尋常的
special.example_en: The car has a number of special safety features.
special.example_zh: 這輛汽車配備有一些特別的安全裝置。

speech.definition: 說話能力;說話;談話;言語
speech.example_en: Children usually develop speech in the second year of life.
speech.example_zh: 兒童通常在兩歲的時候開始說話。

speed.example_en: He was travelling at a speed of 90 mph.
speed.example_zh: 他以每小時90哩的速度行進。

spider.example_en: We watched the spider spin its web.

spirit.definition: 精神；（尤指特定人群、活動、時代或地方的）主導精神
spirit.example_en: The players have a very strong team spirit (= loyalty to each other).
spirit.example_zh: 隊員們有很強的團隊精神。

sport.definition: 體育運動；體育比賽；體育競技項目
sport.example_en: Football, basketball, and hockey are all team sports.
sport.example_zh: 足球、棒球和曲棍球都是團隊運動。

spring.example_zh: 很多球莖植物春天開花。

stage.example_en: The project is in its final stages and should be completed by August.
stage.example_zh: 這個企劃案已進入最後階段，應於八月份完成。

stair.example_en: Go up the stairs and her office is on the right.
stair.example_zh: 上樓後，她的辦公室在右手邊。

stamp.example_en: I stuck a 50p stamp on the envelope.
stamp.example_zh: 我在信封上貼了一枚50便士的郵票。

stand.definition: （使）直立；（使）站立；豎放；（尤指）站起來
stand.example_en: Granny says if she stands for a long time her ankles hurt.
stand.example_zh: 奶奶說她站久了腳踝會痛。

star.example_en: Stars twinkled above them as they lay on the hill.
star.example_zh: 他們躺在小山上，頭頂上繁星閃爍。

start.example_en: When do you start your course/your new job?
start.example_zh: 你甚麽時候開始你的課程／新工作？

state.example_en: The building was in a state of disrepair.

stay.example_en: They need an assistant who is willing to stay for six months.
stay.example_zh: 他們需要一位願意留六個月的助手。

steak.definition: 肉排;肉塊;魚排;魚塊;（尤指）牛排

steal.example_en: She admitted stealing the money from her employers.

steam.example_en: Steam rose from the simmering stew.
steam.example_zh: 火上的燉肉咕嘟咕嘟冒著熱氣。

step.example_en: She stepped backwards and fell over a chair.
step.example_zh: 她向後退，被一把椅子絆倒。

stingy.example_en: He's really stingy and never buys anyone a drink when we go out.
stingy.example_zh: 他非常小氣，我們一起出去時他從來不請喝酒。

stomach.example_en: He was punched in the stomach.

stop.example_en: Once I start eating chocolate, I can't stop.
stop.example_zh: 我一開始吃巧克力，就停不了嘴。

storm.example_en: A lot of trees were blown down in the recent storms.
storm.example_zh: 在最近的暴風雨中，許多樹木被颳倒。

story.definition: （真實或虛構的）故事;敘述，描述;小說
story.example_en: Will you read/tell me a story, daddy?
story.example_zh: 爸爸，能讀／講個故事給我聽嗎？

strange.definition: 不尋常的；奇怪的；不可思議的
strange.example_en: He has some very strange ideas about women!
strange.example_zh: 他對女性有一些非常古怪的看法！

stranger.example_en: My mother always warned me not to talk to strangers.
stranger.example_zh: 我母親總是告誡我不要和陌生人講話。

street.example_en: The streets were strewn with rubbish after the parade.
street.example_zh: 狂歡節過後，街上到處是垃圾。

strike.example_en: Democratization has brought workers the right to strike and join a trade union.
strike.example_zh: 民主化賦予工人罷工和加入工會的權利。

strong.definition: 強有力的，強勁的；強壯的；強烈的
strong.example_en: She must be very strong to carry such a weight on her back.
strong.example_zh: 能把這麼重的東西背在背上，她一定非常強健。

student.example_zh: 法律／哲學／醫學專業的學生

stupid.definition: 愚蠢的;糊塗的;欠考慮的
stupid.example_en: She was really stupid to quit her job like that.
stupid.example_zh: 她就那樣辭掉了工作，簡直是愚蠢透頂。

style.definition: 做事方式；（尤指）風格，作風
style.example_en: Jones favours a dynamic, hands-on style of management.
style.example_zh: 瓊斯喜歡那種充滿活力、事事親力親為的管理風格。

subject.definition: （討論、考慮或研究的）主題，話題;問題;題目
subject.example_en: Our subject for discussion is homelessness.
subject.example_zh: 我們討論的話題是無家可歸問題。

subway.example_en: We took the subway uptown to Yankee Stadium.
subway.example_zh: 我們搭地鐵到城外的洋基體育場去。

succeed.definition: 成功；實現目標；達到目的
succeed.example_en: She's been trying to pass her driving test for six years and she's finally succeeded.
succeed.example_zh: 六年來，她一直努力想通過駕照考試，終於得償所願。

success.example_en: The success of almost any project depends largely on its manager.
success.example_zh: 幾乎所有專案計劃的成功都很大程度地取決於管理者的能力。

sudden.example_en: Drop the gun, put your hands in the air, and don't make any sudden movements.
sudden.example_zh: 把槍放下，手舉起來，別輕舉妄動。

sugar.example_en: I don't take sugar in my coffee, thanks.

suggest.example_en: I suggested an Italian restaurant near the station for the party.
suggest.example_zh: 我建議聚會去火車站附近的一家義大利餐館。

suit.example_en: All the businessmen were wearing pinstripe suits.
suit.example_zh: 所有商人都穿著細條紋套裝。

summer.example_en: We have breakfast on the balcony in (the) summer.
summer.example_zh: 夏天，我們在陽臺上吃早飯。

sun.example_en: The sun rises in the east and sets in the west.

sunday.example_en: We're going to visit my aunt and uncle on Sunday.
sunday.example_zh: 我們週日要去探望我的叔叔和嬸嬸。

sunny.definition: 陽光明媚的，陽光普照的
sunny.example_en: We're having the party in the garden, so I'm praying it'll be sunny.
sunny.example_zh: 我們要在花園裡舉行聚會，所以我正祈禱那天會陽光明媚。

super.example_en: The Natural History Museum is a super place for kids.
super.example_zh: 自然歷史博物館是孩子們的超級好去處。

supper.example_en: Why don't you come to/for supper tonight?
supper.example_zh: 你今天一起來吃晚飯好嗎?

supply.example_en: Electrical power is supplied by underground cables.
supply.example_zh: 電力是由地下電纜輸送的。

support.example_en: My father supported the Labour Party all his life.
support.example_zh: 我父親畢生都擁護工黨／民主黨。

sure.definition: 確定的，肯定的，毫無疑問的
sure.example_en: "What's wrong with him?" "I'm not really sure."

surf.example_en: He spends a lot of time surfing the internet/Net/Web.

surface.example_en: Tropical rain forests used to cover ten percent of the earth's surface.
surface.example_zh: 以前，地球表面的10%都被熱帶雨林所覆蓋。

surprise.example_en: Don't tell Anne we've arranged a party for her - I want it to be a surprise.
surprise.example_zh: 不要告訴安妮我們為她安排了一個派對——我想給她一個驚喜。

surprised.example_en: We were very surprised at the result.
surprised.example_zh: 這個結果讓我們覺得很意外。

survive.definition: 繼續生存，存活;（尤指）倖存
survive.example_en: The baby was born with a heart problem and only survived for a few hours.
survive.example_zh: 這個嬰兒生下來就有心臟病，只活了幾個小時。

swallow.example_en: My throat is so sore that it really hurts when I swallow.
swallow.example_zh: 我的喉嚨很痛，吞嚥起來很難受。

swan.example_en: We watched the swans glide by.
swan.example_zh: 我們看到天鵝輕快地飛過。

sweater.example_en: Put a sweater on if you're cold.
sweater.example_zh: 如果你覺得冷就穿件毛線衫吧。

sweet.example_en: The pineapple was sweet and juicy.

swim.example_en: We spent the day on the beach but it was too cold to go swimming.
swim.example_zh: 我們一整天都在海灘上，但天氣太冷，不能游泳。

swing.example_en: He walked briskly along swinging his rolled-up umbrella.
swing.example_zh: 他搖著收起的傘，步履輕快地走在路上。

symbol.example_en: A heart shape is the symbol of love.

table.example_en: There was a really noisy table behind us celebrating someone's birthday.
table.example_zh: 我們後面的一桌人在給人慶祝生日，吵吵鬧鬧的。

tail.example_en: The dog wagged its tail excitedly.
tail.example_zh: 那隻狗興奮地搖著尾巴。

tale.definition: （尤指包含離奇內容的）故事，不實之詞
tale.example_en: He told some fascinating tales about his life in India.
tale.example_zh: 他講了他在印度生活的一些奇聞軼事。

talent.definition: 天分，天賦;天才，有天分者
talent.example_en: Her talent for music showed at an early age.
talent.example_zh: 她小時候就表現出了音樂天賦。

talk.example_en: We were just talking about Gareth's new girlfriend.
talk.example_zh: 我們剛才在談論葛瑞的新女友。

talkative.definition: 愛說話的，健談的;多嘴的

task.definition: 任務;（尤指經常、不情願或很難做的）工作;（苦）差事
task.example_en: We usually ask interviewees to perform a few simple tasks on the computer just to test their aptitude.
task.example_zh: 我們通常讓接受面試人士在電腦上進行一些簡單操作，只想測測他們的能力。

taste.example_en: I love the taste of garlic.

taxi.example_en: I took a taxi from the station to the hotel.
taxi.example_zh: 我從車站乘計程車去飯店。

teach.example_en: She taught English to foreign students.
teach.example_zh: 她給外國學生講授英語。

team.example_zh: 籃球隊／曲棍球隊／無擋板籃球隊

tear.example_en: You have to be very careful with books this old because the paper tears very easily.
tear.example_zh: 對這麼舊的書你得格外小心，因為它的紙張很容易撕破。

teenager.example_en: The magazine is aimed at teenagers and young adults.
teenager.example_zh: 這份雜誌的讀者對像是青少年和二十來歲的年輕人。

television.definition: 電視機;電視;電視廣播業

tell.example_en: Tell me about your holiday then.
tell.example_zh: 那麼跟我說說你的假期吧。

temperature.example_en: Preheat the oven to a temperature of 200 degrees Celsius.

ten.example_en: Her father died ten years ago.
ten.example_zh: 她的父親在十年前去世了。

term.example_en: He served a short term for drunk driving.
term.example_zh: 他因酒後開車而短期入獄。

terrible.definition: 糟糕的;可怕的;嚴重的;低劣的

test.example_en: The class are doing/having a spelling test today.
test.example_zh: 今天班裡有一個拼寫測驗。

than.definition: （與 more 或 less 連用，比較數量）
than.example_en: My son is a lot taller than my daughter.
than.example_zh: 我的兒子比女兒高得多。

thank.example_en: He thanked me for taking him home.

thanksgiving.definition: 感謝，道謝;（尤指）感恩於上帝

that.example_en: I've never liked that cousin of hers.
that.example_zh: 我從來沒喜歡過她的那個表親。

then.definition: 在當時（過去或未來）（的）;在那時（的）
then.example_en: I was working in the city then.

therefore.example_en: We were unable to get funding and therefore had to abandon the project.
therefore.example_zh: 我們無法籌到資金，因此不得不放棄計劃。

thief.example_en: The art gallery was broken into last night, and the thieves got away with two valuable paintings.
thief.example_zh: 藝術館昨晚遭入室盜竊，被偷走了兩幅珍貴的畫。

think.example_en: I think (that) I've met you before.

third.example_en: the third road on the right

thirsty.example_en: I felt/was hot and thirsty after the basketball game.
thirsty.example_zh: 籃球比賽後我又熱又渴。

thirteen.example_en: Some people think that thirteen is an unlucky number.
thirteen.example_zh: 一些人認為十三是個不吉利的數字。

this.example_en: Can you sign this form here for me?
this.example_zh: 請你在這表上簽個名好嗎？

though.example_en: She hasn't called, even though she said she would.
though.example_zh: 雖然她說過要打電話，可還沒打。

thousand.example_en: They had driven over a/one thousand miles.
thousand.example_zh: 他們駕車超過一千英里。

throat.example_en: A fish bone got stuck in my throat.
throat.example_zh: 我喉嚨裡鯁了一根魚刺。

through.example_en: They walked slowly through the woods.

throw.example_en: My friend threw the ball back over the fence.
throw.example_zh: 我朋友把球從圍欄上擲了回去。

thursday.example_en: I'm getting my hair cut after work on Thursday.
thursday.example_zh: 星期四下班後我去理髮。

tidy.definition: 整齊的;整潔的，有條理的
tidy.example_en: The house was clean and tidy.

tie.example_en: Could you tie this piece of string for me?
tie.example_zh: 你能幫我把這個繩子打個結嗎？

tiger.example_en: Her colleagues saw her as a tiger who would stop at nothing in pursuit of her goals.

till.example_en: We waited till six thirty for you.
till.example_zh: 我們一直等你到六點半。

time.example_en: He wants to spend more time with his family.

tip.example_en: The table tipped, and all our drinks fell on the floor.
tip.example_zh: 桌子翻了，結果我們的所有飲料都掉在地上。

tired.example_en: I was so tired when I got home from work last night that I had a quick nap.
tired.example_zh: 我昨晚下班回家後很累，就小睡了一會兒。

title.example_en: The title of Evelyn Waugh's first novel was "Decline and Fall".
title.example_zh: 伊芙琳‧沃的第一部小說名為《衰落與瓦解》。

toe.example_en: your big toe (= your largest toe)

together.example_en: We used to go to yoga together.
together.example_zh: 我們過去常常一起去做瑜伽。

toilet.example_en: I was on (= using) the toilet when the phone rang.
toilet.example_zh: 電話鈴響時我正在上廁所。

tomorrow.example_en: I'm having dinner with Rachel tomorrow night.
tomorrow.example_zh: 我明天晚上跟瑞秋共進晚餐。

tongue.example_en: I burned my tongue on some soup last night.
tongue.example_zh: 我昨晚喝湯時燙著了舌頭。

tonight.example_en: Tonight will be my first chance to meet her.
tonight.example_zh: 今晚將是我與她見面的第一次機會。

tool.definition: （用於生產或維修的）工具，器具

top.example_en: She waited for me at the top of the stairs.
top.example_zh: 她在樓梯梯頂位置等我。

topic.example_en: Our discussion included topics such as acid rain and the melting of polar ice.
topic.example_zh: 我們的討論涉及各種話題，例如酸雨和極冰融化。

total.example_en: At that time of day, cars with only one occupant accounted for almost 80 percent of the total.
total.example_zh: 一天中的那個時候，只有一人乘坐的汽車幾乎佔車輛總數的80%。

touch.example_en: That paint is wet - don't touch (it).

toward.example_en: She stood up and walked towards him.

towel.example_en: She came downstairs after her shower, wrapped in a towel.
towel.example_zh: 她淋浴後裹著毛巾走下樓來。

tower.definition: 塔;建築物的塔形部分;塔樓，高樓

trace.example_en: The police are trying to trace the mother of a newborn baby found abandoned outside a hospital.
trace.example_zh: 員警試圖查出那位把新生嬰兒拋棄在醫院外面的母親。

trade.example_en: The country's trade in manufactured goods has expanded in the last ten years.
trade.example_zh: 該國的工業品貿易在最近十年裡擴大了規模。

tradition.example_en: Fireworks have long been an American tradition on the Fourth of July.
tradition.example_zh: 七月四日國慶日放煙火是美國人長期以來的傳統。

traditional.example_en: The villagers retain a strong attachment to their traditional values/customs/beliefs.
traditional.example_zh: 村民依然固守著傳統的價值觀／習俗／信仰。

traffic.example_en: There was heavy/a lot of traffic on the roads this morning.
traffic.example_zh: 今晨道路上車流量很大。

trap.example_en: The fox got its foot caught in a trap.
trap.example_zh: 狐狸的一隻腳被夾子夾住了。

trash.example_en: I can't believe that someone of his intelligence can read such trash!
trash.example_zh: 我簡直不敢相信他這麼聰明的人竟然讀這種垃圾東西！

travel.example_en: Between school and university, she spent a year travelling, mostly in Africa and Asia.
travel.example_zh: 中學畢業後，她在上大學以前花了一年時間旅行，主要是在非洲和亞洲。

treasure.example_en: Stories about pirates often include a search for buried treasure.
treasure.example_zh: 海盜故事中經常包括搜尋寶藏。

treat.example_en: My parents treated us all the same when we were kids.
treat.example_zh: 小時候，父母對我們一視同仁。

trick.example_en: She played a really nasty trick on me - she put syrup in my shampoo bottle!
trick.example_zh: 她對我做了一個很討厭的惡作劇——把糖漿放進我裝洗髮精的瓶子裡。

trip.example_en: The trip from York to Newcastle takes about an hour by train.
trip.example_zh: 乘火車從約克到新堡大約要一個小時。

trouble.example_en: The tax forms were complicated and I had a lot of trouble with them.
trouble.example_zh: 這張稅務表格十分複雜，我填起來很費勁。

trousers.example_en: I need a new pair of trousers to go with this jacket.
trousers.example_zh: 我需要一條新褲子來配這件夾克。

truck.example_en: The road was completely blocked by an overturned truck.
truck.example_zh: 道路完全被翻倒的貨車堵住了。

true.definition: （尤指事實或陳述）正確的，真實的，確實的；如實的
true.example_en: Is it true that Mariana and Mark are getting married?
true.example_zh: 瑪麗安娜和馬克真的要結婚嗎？

trust.example_en: My sister warned me not to trust him.
trust.example_zh: 我姐姐告誡我不要相信他。

truth.example_en: There would seem to be some truth in what she says.
truth.example_zh: 她說的話似乎有些真實的成分。

try.example_en: Keep trying and you'll find a job eventually.
try.example_zh: 不斷努力，你最終會找到工作的。

tube.definition: （塑膠、金屬、橡膠或玻璃製成的）管，管子
tube.example_en: Gases produced in the reaction pass through this tube and can then be collected.
tube.example_zh: 反應中產生的氣體穿過這條管子就可以收集起來。

tuesday.example_en: We'll meet at eight on Tuesday.

tunnel.example_en: The train went into the tunnel.

turn.example_en: The earth turns on its axis once every 24 hours.
turn.example_zh: 地球每24小時繞地軸自轉一周。

turtle.example_en: Thousands of turtles emerged from the waves and crawled across the sand on unsteady flippers.

twelve.example_en: The cafeteria opens for lunch at twelve (o'clock).
twelve.example_zh: 餐廳十二點開門供應午餐。

type.example_en: There were so many different types of bread that I didn't know which to buy.
type.example_zh: 麵包種類繁多，我不知該買哪一種。

typhoon.example_en: The 169,000-ton vessel went down during a typhoon in the South China Sea.
typhoon.example_zh: 颱風中，一艘169 000噸位的輪船在南中國海沉沒了。

ugly.example_en: I think a lot of modern architecture is very ugly.
ugly.example_zh: 我覺得很多現代建築都非常難看。

umbrella.example_en: I felt a few drops of rain, so I put my umbrella up.
umbrella.example_zh: 我感到有幾滴雨點，於是便撐起了雨傘。

uncle.definition: 舅父;伯父;叔父;姨父;姑父
uncle.example_en: I have lots of uncles and aunts.
uncle.example_zh: 我有很多叔叔、舅舅、姑姑和姨媽。

under.definition: 在（或到）下面；在（或到）下方

underline.definition: （尤指爲了強調）在（詞語）下面畫線
underline.example_en: All the technical words have been underlined in red.
underline.example_zh: 所有術語的下面都畫了紅線。

understand.example_en: She explained the whole idea again, but I still didn't understand.
understand.example_zh: 她把整個想法又解釋了一遍，但我還是不明白。

unhappy.definition: 哀傷的，不高興的;不滿意的
unhappy.example_en: That's enough to make anyone unhappy.

unique.definition: 獨一無二的；與眾不同的；唯一的；獨特的；罕見的
unique.example_en: Each person's genetic code is unique except in the case of identical twins.
unique.example_zh: 每個人的遺傳密碼都是獨一無二的，同卵雙胞胎除外。

universe.example_en: Is there intelligent life elsewhere in the universe?
universe.example_zh: 宇宙中其他地方存在有智慧的生命嗎？

university.example_en: Which university did you go to/were you at (= did you study at)?

until.example_en: I was up until three o'clock trying to get it finished!
until.example_zh: 為了完成工作，我一直熬夜做到三點！

up.definition: 向較高處；向上；（價值、數位或水準）加大地；增高地
up.example_en: Put those books up on the top shelf.
up.example_zh: 把那些書放到書架頂層上去。

upper.definition: （位置或水準）較高的，較上的；上層的
upper.example_en: The office building's upper floors were being repainted.
upper.example_zh: 辦公樓的上面幾層在重新油漆。

use.example_en: This glass has been used - could you get me a clean one?
use.example_zh: 這個杯子用過了——請給我拿一個乾淨的。

useful.definition: 有用的，有效的；有助益的
useful.example_en: A good knife is probably one of the most useful things you can have in a kitchen.
useful.example_zh: 一把好刀應該是廚房裡最有用的物件之一。

user.example_en: Unemployed people are the main users of this advice centre.
user.example_zh: 失業人員是這個諮詢中心的主要客戶。

usual.example_en: I went to bed at my usual time.
usual.example_zh: 我和平常一樣準時上床睡覺。

usually.example_en: He usually gets home about six o'clock.
usually.example_zh: 他通常在六點左右到家。

vacation.example_en: We're taking a vacation in June.

value.example_en: She had already sold everything of value that she possessed.
value.example_zh: 她已經把自己所有值錢的東西都賣了。

vendor.example_en: For the past few months she's been working as a street vendor, selling fruit and vegetables.
vendor.example_zh: 幾個月以來，她一直在街頭賣水果和蔬菜。

very.definition: （用於強調形容詞或副詞）很，非常

vest.definition: （無袖保暖）內衣;（貼身穿的）背心

victory.example_en: The Redskins opened the season by scoring a resounding/stunning/impressive 25–3 victory against/over Detroit.
victory.example_zh: 賽季首場比賽紅人隊便以25比3的驚人比分大勝底特律隊。

video.example_en: My new laptop handles video really well.
video.example_zh: 我的新筆記型電腦很適合播放錄影。

visit.example_en: We visited a few galleries while we were in Prague.
visit.example_zh: 我們在布拉格時參觀了幾家畫廊。

visitor.example_en: You have some visitors to see you.

vocabulary.definition: 詞彙量;（某人掌握的）全部詞彙

voice.example_zh: 她說話聲音很大／很輕／很柔。

volleyball.example_en: In physical education, we play volleyball or do exercises.

vote.example_en: She was too young to vote in the election.
vote.example_zh: 她的年齡太小，不能在選舉中投票。

wait.example_en: I waited for her outside while she went in to see the doctor.
wait.example_zh: 她進去看病時，我在外面等她。

wake.example_en: Did you wake at all during the night?

wall.example_en: The walls in this apartment are so thin you can hear just about every word the neighbours say.
wall.example_zh: 這間公寓的牆太薄了，甚至隔壁的人說的每一句話你都可以聽見。

wallet.example_en: He pulled out a big, fat wallet stuffed with banknotes.
wallet.example_zh: 他掏出一個塞滿鈔票的鼓鼓囊囊的大錢包。

want.definition: 想要，希望（英國英語中禮貌的請求不用 want）

warm.example_en: Are you warm enough or do you want me to put the heating on?
warm.example_zh: 你暖不暖和，要不要我開暖氣？

waste.example_en: That meeting achieved absolutely nothing - it was a complete waste of time.
waste.example_zh: 那次會議根本沒有取得甚麼成果——純粹是浪費時間。

watch.example_en: I had dinner and watched TV for a couple of hours.
watch.example_zh: 我吃了飯，然後看了幾個小時電視。

wave.definition: 揮（手）；招手，擺手（表示問候、指示或強調）
wave.example_en: I waved to/at him from the window but he didn't see me.
wave.example_zh: 我從窗口向他招手，可他沒看見我。

way.example_en: Do you know the way to the restaurant?
way.example_zh: 你知道去餐館怎麼走嗎？

weak.example_en: It's not surprising you feel weak if you haven't eaten properly for days.
weak.example_zh: 如果你幾天都沒有好好吃東西的話，覺得虛弱無力是很自然的。

wear.example_en: Tracey is wearing a simple black dress.
wear.example_zh: 翠西身著一襲素淨的黑色長裙。

weather.example_zh: 壞／好／冷的／乾燥的／炎熱的／暴風雨／溫暖的／潮濕的天氣（等等）

wedding.example_zh: 婚禮蛋糕／禮服／請柬／禮物／招待會

wednesday.example_en: Did you say the meeting is on Wednesday?
wednesday.example_zh: 你是說會議在星期三開嗎？

week.definition: 星期，週（尤指從星期一到星期日或從星期日到星期六

weekday.example_en: On weekdays I'm usually in bed by ten o'clock.
weekday.example_zh: 工作日期間我通常十時前上床睡覺。

weekend.definition: 週末（週六和週日，有時也包括週五晚上）
weekend.example_en: This/Next weekend we're going to see some friends.
weekend.example_zh: 本／下週末我們要去拜訪一些朋友。

weight.example_en: What weight can this lorry safely carry?
weight.example_zh: 這輛貨車的安全載重量是多少？

welcome.definition: 樂於接受;歡迎;鼓勵;支持
welcome.example_en: The new appointment has been widely welcomed.
welcome.example_zh: 這個新任命受到廣泛歡迎。

well.example_en: The documentary presented both sides of the problem very well.
well.example_zh: 這部紀錄片很好地呈現了問題的兩個方面。

west.example_en: The points of the compass are north, south, east, and west.
west.example_zh: 指南針上的方向有北、南、東和西。

wheel.example_en: I got my bag caught in the wheel of my bicycle.
wheel.example_zh: 我的書包被絞進了腳踏車車輪裡。

when.example_en: "I did tell you about it." "When? I don't remember."
when.example_zh: 「我確實告訴過你這件事。」「甚麼時候？我不記得了。」

whether.definition: （尤用於轉述問題或表達疑問）是否
whether.example_en: I wasn't sure whether you'd like it.
whether.example_zh: 我不肯定你是否喜歡它。

which.definition: （用於答案數目固定或有限的問題中）哪個;哪些
which.example_en: Which party would you prefer to go to - Anna's or Dan's ?
which.example_zh: 你更想去哪個聚會——安娜的還是丹的？

while.example_en: I read it while you were drying your hair.
while.example_zh: 在你吹亁頭髮的時候，我讀了它。

whole.example_en: I spent the whole day cleaning.
whole.example_zh: 我花了一整天打掃衛生。

wide.example_zh: 寬闊的河流／道路／巨大的裂口／大腳

wife.example_en: I met Greg's wife for the first time.
wife.example_zh: 我是第一次見到葛列格的妻子。

will.example_en: Clare will be five years old next month.
will.example_zh: 下個月克萊爾就五歲了。

win.example_en: Which year was it that Italy won the World Cup?
win.example_zh: 義大利是哪一年贏得世界盃的？

wind.example_en: There isn't enough wind to fly a kite.
wind.example_zh: 風不夠大，風箏飛不起來。

window.example_en: Is it all right if I open/close the window?
window.example_zh: 我打開／關上窗戶可以嗎？

windy.example_zh: 那是個刮著大風的夜晚。

wine.example_zh: 酒窖／酒鑒賞家／鎮酒冰壺／玻璃酒杯

wing.example_en: the delicacy of a butterfly's wings

winner.example_en: There'll be a prize for the winner.

winter.example_en: I think you tend to eat more in (the) winter.
winter.example_zh: 我想你在冬天可能會吃得更多。

wise.example_en: I think you made a wise choice.
wise.example_zh: 我認為你作了一個明智的選擇。

wish.definition: （與過去時連用，對已經存在的情況表示遺憾）但願，希望
wish.example_en: I wish (that) I was/were a bit taller.
wish.example_zh: 我個子再高一點就好了。

with.example_en: I was with Sylvia at the time.
with.example_zh: 那時我和西爾維婭在一起。

wolf.example_en: Wolves hunt in groups known as packs.

woman.example_zh: 她真是個非常好的女人。

wonder.example_en: Shouldn't you phone home? Your parents will be wondering where you are.
wonder.example_zh: 你是不是最好給家裡打個電話？你父母會想知道你在哪裡的。

wonderful.definition: 絕妙的，令人驚嘆的，極好的
wonderful.example_zh: 他是個非常出色的廚師。

wood.example_en: He gathered some wood to build a fire.
wood.example_zh: 他撿了些木頭生了一堆火。

wool.example_en: Australia is one of the world's main producers of wool.
wool.example_zh: 澳大利亞是世界上主要的羊毛產地之一。

word.example_en: Your essay should be no more than two thousand words long.

work.example_en: I've got so much work to do.

worker.example_zh: 工廠工人／社會工作者／建築工人

world.example_en: Different parts of the world have very different climatic conditions.
world.example_zh: 世界上不同地區的氣候狀況大不相同。

worm.example_en: The kiwi bird eats worms, other invertebrates, and berries.
worm.example_zh: 奇翼鳥以蠕蟲、其他無脊椎動物和漿果為食。

worry.example_en: Try not to worry - there's nothing you can do to change the situation.
worry.example_zh: 別發愁了——你沒法改變這種局面。

worth.example_zh: 我們的房子價值約20萬英鎊。

wrist.example_en: I sprained my wrist playing tennis.
wrist.example_zh: 我打網球時扭傷了手腕。

write.example_en: When you fill in the form, please write clearly/legibly in black ink.
write.example_zh: 填表時，請用黑色墨水書寫清楚。

writer.example_zh: 遊記／體育專欄／小說／犯罪小說作家

wrong.example_en: Three of your answers were wrong.
wrong.example_zh: 你的回答中有三個是錯的。

year.definition: 年，年份，（尤指一月一日至十二月三十一日間的）一年時間
year.example_en: Annette worked in Italy for two years.
year.example_zh: 安妮特在義大利工作了兩年。

yellow.example_en: It was early autumn and the leaves were turning yellow.
yellow.example_zh: 正值初秋時節，樹葉開始轉黃。

yes.definition: （用於表示接受、願意或贊同）好的，是的
yes.example_en: "Would you like a glass of wine?" "Yes, thanks."
yes.example_zh: 「你想要來杯葡萄酒嗎？」「好的，謝謝。」

yesterday.example_en: He called yesterday while you were out.
yesterday.example_zh: 昨天你外出時他打電話來了。

yet.example_en: I haven't spoken to her yet.

youth.example_en: I was a fairly good football player in my youth.
youth.example_zh: 我年輕時是個相當不錯的足球員。

yummy.example_en: I think I'll have some more of that yummy chocolate cake.
yummy.example_zh: 我想我要再來些那種美味的巧克力蛋糕。

zero.example_en: Five, four, three, two, one, zero.

zoo.example_en: The school cafeteria is a zoo.
zoo.example_zh: 學校的餐廳簡直一片混亂。
